        ],
        "originalContents": "\n            \n            # --- Build data rows ---\n            if view_mode == 'own_team':\n                # Build main data rows (one per round)\n                data = []\n                for rnd in all_rounds:\n                    # Get opponent team name for this round (from own or opponent data)\n                    if rnd in team_data[Columns.round_number].values:\n                        opponent_team = team_data[team_data[Columns.round_number] == rnd][Columns.team_name_opponent].iloc[0]\n                    elif rnd in opponent_data[Columns.round_number].values:\n                        opponent_team = opponent_data[opponent_data[Columns.round_number] == rnd][Columns.team_name].iloc[0]\n                    else:\n                        opponent_team = \"\"\n                    row = [int(rnd), opponent_team]\n                    # For each player, always output pos, score, points (blank if not played)\n                    for player in own_players:\n                        if rnd in own_part_map[player]:\n                            row_data = own_part_map[player][rnd]\n                            row.append(int(row_data[Columns.position] + 1) if not pd.isnull(row_data[Columns.position]) else \"\")\n                            row.append(int(row_data[Columns.score]) if not pd.isnull(row_data[Columns.score]) else \"\")\n                            row.append(float(row_data[Columns.points]) if not pd.isnull(row_data[Columns.points]) else \"\")\n                        else:\n                            row.extend([\"\", \"\", \"\"])\n                    # Team totals for this round (if available)\n                    team_totals = team_data[(team_data[Columns.round_number] == rnd) \u0026 (team_data[Columns.computed_data] == True)]\n                    if not team_totals.empty:\n                        row.append(int(team_totals[Columns.score].iloc[0]))\n                        row.append(int(team_totals[Columns.points].iloc[0]))\n                    else:\n                        row.extend([\"\", \"\"])\n                    data.append(row)",

        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\n\n                    \n                    ...\n\n                    \n                    # Add metadata for styling\n                    row_metadata.append({\n                        'rowType': 'player',\n                        'styling': {},\n                        'position': int(position),\n                        'isFirstInPosition': False\n                    })\n                    \n                    data.append(row)\n            \n            # Add team total row\n            if not team_data.empty:\n                # Start with position and name\n                team_row = [\"Team\", team]\n                \n                # Add game data for team\n                for game in games:\n                    game_data = team_data[team_data[Columns.round_number] == game]\n                    if not game_data.empty:\n                        team_row.append(int(game_data[Columns.score].iloc[0]))\n                        team_row.append(round(float(game_data[Columns.points].iloc[0]), 1))\n                    else:\n                        team_row.append(0)\n                        team_row.append(0)\n                \n                # Calculate team totals\n                team_row.append(int(team_data[Columns.points].sum()))\n                team_row.append(int(team_data[Columns.score].sum()))\n                team_row.append(round(float(player_data[Columns.score].mean()), 1) if len(player_data) \u003e 0 else 0)\n                \n                # Add metadata for styling\n                row_metadata.append({\n                    'rowType': 'team',\n                    'styling': {\n                        'fontWeight': 'bold',\n                        'borderTop': '2px solid #000000'\n                    }\n                })\n                \n                data.append(team_row)",

        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\n\r\n        \r\n        ...\n\r\n        \r\n        # Add columns for each game\r\n        for game_idx in range(1, n_games + 1):\r\n            columns.extend([\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Score_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Score',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                },\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Points_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Pts',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                }\r\n            ])\r\n        \r\n        # Add total columns\r\n        columns.extend([\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Points_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Points',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Score',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Average',\r\n                'title': 'Avg',\r\n                'className': 'text-center',\r\n                'formatter': '(value || 0).toFixed(1)'\r\n            }\r\n        ])\r\n\r\n        # Create the complete table configuration matching the component's expected structure\r\n        table_config = {\r\n            'data': rows,  # The actual data rows\r\n            'columns': columns,  # Column definitions\r\n            'headerGroups': header_groups,  # Header group definitions\r\n            'rowNumbering': False,  # Disable row numbers\r\n            'positionChange': False,  # Disable position change indicators\r\n            'metadata': {  # Additional metadata\r\n                'league': league_name,\r\n                'season': season,\r\n                'week': week,\r\n                'location': 'TBD'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(table_config)\r\n        return table_config",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Get details for a specific team in a specific week\"\"\"\n        # Create a query for this specific team, league, season, and week\n        query = LeagueQuery(season=season, league=league, team=team, week=week)\n        \n        # Get the data\n        team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(query.to_filter_dict())\n        \n        if team_data.empty:\n            return {\"config\": []}\n        \n        # Process the data into the expected format for the frontend\n        config = []\n        \n        # Add player details\n        for _, row in team_data.iterrows():\n            if \"Player\" in team_data.columns and \"Score\" in team_data.columns and \"Opponent\" in team_data.columns:\n                player_detail = {\n                    \"player\": row.get(\"Player\", \"\"),\n                    \"score\": row.get(\"Score\", 0),\n                    \"opponent\": row.get(\"Opponent\", \"\")\n                }\n                config.append(player_detail)\n        \n        return {\"config\": config}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 15
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17
          },
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "class LeagueService:"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    def __init__(self, adapter_type=DataAdapterSelector.PANDAS):"

        "originalContents": "\n\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e Dict[str, Any]:\n        \"\"\"Get details for a specific team in a specific week\"\"\"\n        # Create a query for this specific team, league, season, and week\n        query = LeagueQuery(season=season, league=league, team=team, week=week)\n        \n        # Get the data\n        team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(query.to_filter_dict())\n        \n        if team_data.empty:\n            return {\"config\": []}\n        \n        # Process the data into the expected format for the frontend\n        config = []\n        \n        # Add player details\n        for _, row in team_data.iterrows():\n            if \"Player\" in team_data.columns and \"Score\" in team_data.columns and \"Opponent\" in team_data.columns:\n                player_detail = {\n                    \"player\": row.get(\"Player\", \"\"),\n                    \"score\": row.get(\"Score\", 0),\n                    \"opponent\": row.get(\"Opponent\", \"\")\n                }\n                config.append(player_detail)\n        \n        return {\"config\": config}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1974

          "startPosition": {
            "column": 105,
            "line": 14
          }

only fill if player participated in this position\n                    for game in games:\n                        game_data = player_rows[player_rows[Columns.round_number] == game]\n                        \n                        if not game_data.empty:\n                            row.append(int(game_data[Columns.score].iloc[0]))\n                            row.append(round(float(game_data[Columns.points].iloc[0]), 1))\n                        else:\n                            row.append(\"\")\n                            row.append(\"\")\n                    \n                    # Calculate totals for this player-position combination\n                    total_points = int(player_rows[Columns.points].sum()) if not player_rows.empty else 0\n                    total_score = int(player_rows[Columns.score].sum()) if not player_rows.empty else 0\n                    average = round(float(player_rows[Columns.score].mean()), 1) if not player_rows.empty and len(player_rows) \u003e 0 else 0\n                    \n                    row.extend([total_points, total_score, average])",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_details_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Details Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}, team={team}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_details_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_details_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

        "originalContents": "\r\n\r\n@bp.route('/league/get_team_week_details_table')\r\ndef get_team_week_details_table():\r\n    try:\r\n        season = request.args.get('season')\r\n        league = request.args.get('league')\r\n        week = int(request.args.get('week'))\r\n        team = request.args.get('team')\r\n        \r\n        print(f\"Team Week Details Table - Received request with: season={season}, league={league}, week={week}, team={team}\")\r\n        \r\n        if not all([season, league, week, team]):\r\n            return jsonify({'error': i18n_service.get_text('missing_parameters')}), 400\r\n        \r\n        # Get the table data from the service\r\n        table_data = league_service.get_team_week_details_table_data(\r\n            league=league, \r\n            season=season, \r\n            team=team, \r\n            week=week\r\n        )\r\n        \r\n        if not table_data:\r\n            return jsonify({\"message\": \"No data found for these filters\"}), 404\r\n        \r\n        # Convert TableData to dictionary and return as JSON\r\n        print(table_data)\r\n        return jsonify(table_data.to_dict())\r\n        \r\n    except Exception as e:\r\n        import traceback\r\n        print(f\"Error in get_team_week_details_table: {str(e)}\")\r\n        print(f\"Traceback: {traceback.format_exc()}\")\r\n        return jsonify({\"error\": str(e)}), 500",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int) -\u003e TableData:\n\n            \n            ...\n\n            \n            opponent_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=opponent_filters)\n            \n            # Get individual opponent data to calculate average based on individual results\n            opponent_individual_filters = {\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}  # Individual data, not computed\n            }\n            \n            opponent_individual_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=opponent_individual_filters)\n            \n            # Get unique games (round_number) for this team and map to opponent names\n            games = sorted(player_data[Columns.round_number].unique())\n            \n            # Create a mapping of round_number to opponent team name\n            game_to_opponent = {}\n            for game in games:\n                game_data = player_data[player_data[Columns.round_number] == game]\n                if not game_data.empty:\n                    opponent_name = game_data[Columns.team_name_opponent].iloc[0]\n                    game_to_opponent[game] = opponent_name\n            \n            # Create column groups\n            columns = [\n                ColumnGroup(\n                    title=\"Player\",\n                    frozen=\"left\",\n                    style={\"backgroundColor\": \"#f8f9fa\"},\n                    columns=[\n                        Column(title=\"Pos\", field=\"position\", width=\"50px\", align=\"center\"),\n                        Column(title=\"Name\", field=\"name\", width=\"200px\", align=\"left\")\n                    ]\n                )\n            ]",

_**Agent**_

I found the issue! Looking at the code, there's a critical bug in the `get_team_individual_scores_table` method. On line 1940, there's an `else` clause that's incorrectly placed:

```python
else:
    row.extend(["", "", ""])
    data.append(row)  # This is the problem!
```

This `data.append(row)` is inside the `else` clause, which means it's only executed when a player has no data for a round. But it should be executed for every round, regardless of whether the player has data or not.

Let me fix this:


_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: app/services/league_service.py</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 2, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1935,5 +1935,6 @@
                  else:
                      row.extend(["", "", ""])
-                     data.append(row)
+             
+             data.append(row)
              row_metadata.append({'rowType': 'match', 'styling': {}})
  
```

</details>

</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **search_replace**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent**_

Perfect! Now the `data.append(row)` is outside the player loop and will be executed once per round, which is the correct behavior.

## **What Was Fixed:**

### **✅ "New" View Data Issue**
- **Problem**: The "New" view was only showing one row instead of all rounds
- **Root Cause**: `data.append(row)` was incorrectly placed inside the `else` clause of the player data processing loop
- **Fix**: Moved `data.append(row)` outside the player loop so it executes once per round

### **✅ Expected Result:**
Now the "New" view should display:
- **One row per round/match** (not just one row total)
- **All player data** for each round
- **Proper opponent names** and team totals
- **Summary row** at the bottom

The "New" view should now work correctly and show all the match data for the selected team and week! 🎯

{
  "codeResults": [

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003cscript src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/echarts@5.6.0/dist/echarts.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n// Semantic Color System - Palette-specific mappings\r\nconst SEMANTIC_COLOR_MAPPINGS = {\r\n    harmonic10: {\r\n        positive: 2,   // Green shade in harmonic10\r\n        negative: 3,   // Red shade in harmonic10\r\n        highlight: 9   // turquoise highlight in harmonic10\r\n    },\r\n    rainbowPastel: {\r\n        positive: 2,   // Green shade in rainbowPastel\r\n        negative: 6,   // Red shade in rainbowPastel\r\n        highlight: 9   // violet highlight in rainbowPastel\r\n    }\r\n    // Add more palette mappings here as needed\r\n    // modern: { positive: 1, negative: 5, highlight: 3 },\r\n    // dark: { positive: 3, negative: 7, highlight: 1 }\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction getSemanticColor(semanticName) {\r\n    const currentPalette = TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[currentPaletteName];\r\n    const semanticMapping = SEMANTIC_COLOR_MAPPINGS[currentPaletteName];\r\n    \r\n    if (semanticMapping \u0026\u0026 semanticMapping[semanticName] !== undefined) {\r\n        const paletteIndex = semanticMapping[semanticName];\r\n        if (currentPalette[paletteIndex]) {\r\n            return currentPalette[paletteIndex];\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Fallback colors if palette doesn't have mapping or enough colors\r\n    const fallbackColors = {\r\n        positive: '#2CA02C',  // Green\r\n        negative: '#D62728',  // Red\r\n        highlight: '#ffd700'  // Gold\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    return fallbackColors[semanticName] || '#888';\r\n}\r\n\r\n// --- Team Color Palettes ---\r\nconst TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES = {\r\n  \"harmonic10\": [\r\n    \"#1F77B4\", \"#FF7F0E\", \"#2CA02C\", \"#D62728\", \"#9467BD\",\r\n    \"#8C564B\", \"#E377C2\", \"#7F7F7F\", \"#BCBD22\", \"#17BECF\"\r\n  ],\r\n  \"rainbowPastel\": [\r\n    \"#1B8CA6\", \"#2CA89A\", \"#8CBF8A\", \"#E6C86E\", \"#F7A86E\",\r\n    \"#E86E56\", \"#D95A6A\", \"#C94C8A\", \"#A04CBF\", \"#D6A4E6\"\r\n  ]\r\n};\r\n\r\n// Default palette\r\nlet currentPaletteName = \"harmonic10\";\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "        const paletteIndex = semanticMapping[semanticName];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "        if (currentPalette[paletteIndex]) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            return currentPalette[paletteIndex];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    // Fallback colors if palette doesn't have mapping or enough colors\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "    const fallbackColors = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        positive: '#2CA02C',  // Green\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        negative: '#D62728',  // Red\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        highlight: '#ffd700'  // Gold\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "    };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "    return fallbackColors[semanticName] || '#888';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "// --- Team Color Palettes ---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "const TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "  \"harmonic10\": [\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    \"#1F77B4\", \"#FF7F0E\", \"#2CA02C\", \"#D62728\", \"#9467BD\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47,
            "text": "    \"#8C564B\", \"#E377C2\", \"#7F7F7F\", \"#BCBD22\", \"#17BECF\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 48,
            "text": "  ],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 49,
            "text": "  \"rainbowPastel\": [\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 50,
            "text": "    \"#1B8CA6\", \"#2CA89A\", \"#8CBF8A\", \"#E6C86E\", \"#F7A86E\",\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 51,
            "text": "    \"#E86E56\", \"#D95A6A\", \"#C94C8A\", \"#A04CBF\", \"#D6A4E6\"\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 52,
            "text": "  ]\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 53,
            "text": "};\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 54,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "// Default palette\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "let currentPaletteName = \"harmonic10\";\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "let currentPalette = TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[currentPaletteName];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\u003cscript src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\u003cscript src=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/echarts@5.6.0/dist/echarts.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\n// Semantic Color System - Palette-specific mappings\r\nconst SEMANTIC_COLOR_MAPPINGS = {\r\n    harmonic10: {\r\n        positive: 2,   // Green shade in harmonic10\r\n        negative: 3,   // Red shade in harmonic10\r\n        highlight: 9   // turquoise highlight in harmonic10\r\n    },\r\n    rainbowPastel: {\r\n        positive: 2,   // Green shade in rainbowPastel\r\n        negative: 6,   // Red shade in rainbowPastel\r\n        highlight: 9   // violet highlight in rainbowPastel\r\n    }\r\n    // Add more palette mappings here as needed\r\n    // modern: { positive: 1, negative: 5, highlight: 3 },\r\n    // dark: { positive: 3, negative: 7, highlight: 1 }\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction getSemanticColor(semanticName) {\r\n    const currentPalette = TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[currentPaletteName];\r\n    const semanticMapping = SEMANTIC_COLOR_MAPPINGS[currentPaletteName];\r\n    \r\n    if (semanticMapping \u0026\u0026 semanticMapping[semanticName] !== undefined) {\r\n        const paletteIndex = semanticMapping[semanticName];\r\n        if (currentPalette[paletteIndex]) {\r\n            return currentPalette[paletteIndex];\r\n        }\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Fallback colors if palette doesn't have mapping or enough colors\r\n    const fallbackColors = {\r\n        positive: '#2CA02C',  // Green\r\n        negative: '#D62728',  // Red\r\n        highlight: '#ffd700'  // Gold\r\n    };\r\n    \r\n    return fallbackColors[semanticName] || '#888';\r\n}\r\n\r\n// --- Team Color Palettes ---\r\nconst TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES = {\r\n  \"harmonic10\": [\r\n    \"#1F77B4\", \"#FF7F0E\", \"#2CA02C\", \"#D62728\", \"#9467BD\",\r\n    \"#8C564B\", \"#E377C2\", \"#7F7F7F\", \"#BCBD22\", \"#17BECF\"\r\n  ],\r\n  \"rainbowPastel\": [\r\n    \"#1B8CA6\", \"#2CA89A\", \"#8CBF8A\", \"#E6C86E\", \"#F7A86E\",\r\n    \"#E86E56\", \"#D95A6A\", \"#C94C8A\", \"#A04CBF\", \"#D6A4E6\"\r\n  ]\r\n};\r\n\r\n// Default palette\r\nlet currentPaletteName = \"harmonic10\";\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 58
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },

      },

        "originalContents": "                \u003cli class=\"nav-item dropdown\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ca class=\"nav-link dropdown-toggle\" href=\"#\" id=\"paletteDropdown\" role=\"button\" data-bs-toggle=\"dropdown\" aria-expanded=\"false\"\u003e\r\n                        🎨 \u003cspan id=\"currentPaletteText\"\u003ePalette\u003c/span\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/a\u003e\r\n                    \u003cul class=\"dropdown-menu dropdown-menu-end\" aria-labelledby=\"paletteDropdown\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cli\u003e\u003ca class=\"dropdown-item palette-option\" href=\"#\" data-palette=\"harmonic10\"\u003eHarmonic 10\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\r\n                        \u003cli\u003e\u003ca class=\"dropdown-item palette-option\" href=\"#\" data-palette=\"rainbowPastel\"\u003eRainbow Pastel\u003c/a\u003e\u003c/li\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/ul\u003e\r\n                \u003c/li\u003e\r\n            \u003c/ul\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\u003c/nav\u003e ",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "let currentPalette = TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[currentPaletteName];\r\n\r\nlet teamColorMap = {};\r\n\r\nfunction updateTeamColorMap(currentTeams) {\r\n  // Remove teams no longer present\r\n  Object.keys(teamColorMap).forEach(team =\u003e {\r\n    if (!currentTeams.includes(team)) {\r\n      delete teamColorMap[team];\r\n    }\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  // Assign colors to new teams\r\n  const usedColors = Object.values(teamColorMap);\r\n  let paletteIdx = 0;\r\n  currentTeams.forEach(team =\u003e {\r\n    if (!teamColorMap[team]) {\r\n      // Find the next unused color in the palette\r\n      while (paletteIdx \u003c currentPalette.length \u0026\u0026 usedColors.includes(currentPalette[paletteIdx])) {\r\n        paletteIdx++;\r\n      }\r\n      // If we run out of unique colors, start reusing\r\n      teamColorMap[team] = currentPalette[paletteIdx % currentPalette.length];\r\n      paletteIdx++;\r\n    }\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getTeamColor(team) {\r\n  return teamColorMap[team] || \"#888\"; // fallback color\r\n}\r\n\r\n// --- Palette Switcher UI ---\r\nfunction renderPaletteSwitcher(containerId = \"paletteSwitcher\") {\r\n  const container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r\n  if (!container) return;\r\n  container.innerHTML = \"\u003cb\u003eColor Palette:\u003c/b\u003e \";\r\n  Object.keys(TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES).forEach(name =\u003e {\r\n    const btn = document.createElement(\"button\");\r\n    btn.textContent = name.replace(/([A-Z])/g, \" $1\").replace(/^./, s =\u003e s.toUpperCase());\r\n    btn.onclick = () =\u003e {\r\n      currentPaletteName = name;\r\n      currentPalette = TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[name];\r\n      if (typeof window.refreshAllCharts === \"function\") window.refreshAllCharts();\r\n    };\r\n    btn.style.margin = \"0 4px\";\r\n    btn.style.padding = \"4px 10px\";\r\n    btn.style.borderRadius = \"4px\";\r\n    btn.style.border = name === currentPaletteName ? \"2px solid #222\" : \"1px solid #aaa\";\r\n    btn.style.background = name === currentPaletteName ? \"#eee\" : \"#fff\";\r\n    btn.style.cursor = \"pointer\";\r\n    container.appendChild(btn);\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\n// --- Global chart refresh stub (user should implement) ---\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 55,
            "text": "// Default palette\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 56,
            "text": "let currentPaletteName = \"harmonic10\";\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 57,
            "text": "let currentPalette = TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[currentPaletteName];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 58,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 59,
            "text": "let teamColorMap = {};\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 60,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 61,
            "text": "function updateTeamColorMap(currentTeams) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 62,
            "text": "  // Remove teams no longer present\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 63,
            "text": "  Object.keys(teamColorMap).forEach(team =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 64,
            "text": "    if (!currentTeams.includes(team)) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 65,
            "text": "      delete teamColorMap[team];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 66,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 67,
            "text": "  });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 68,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69,
            "text": "  // Assign colors to new teams\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 70,
            "text": "  const usedColors = Object.values(teamColorMap);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 71,
            "text": "  let paletteIdx = 0;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 72,
            "text": "  currentTeams.forEach(team =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 73,
            "text": "    if (!teamColorMap[team]) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 74,
            "text": "      // Find the next unused color in the palette\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 75,
            "text": "      while (paletteIdx \u003c currentPalette.length \u0026\u0026 usedColors.includes(currentPalette[paletteIdx])) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 76,
            "text": "        paletteIdx++;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 77,
            "text": "      }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 78,
            "text": "      // If we run out of unique colors, start reusing\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 79,
            "text": "      teamColorMap[team] = currentPalette[paletteIdx % currentPalette.length];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 80,
            "text": "      paletteIdx++;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 81,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 82,
            "text": "  });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 83,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 84,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 85,
            "text": "function getTeamColor(team) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 86,
            "text": "  return teamColorMap[team] || \"#888\"; // fallback color\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 87,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 88,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 89,
            "text": "// --- Palette Switcher UI ---\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 90,
            "text": "function renderPaletteSwitcher(containerId = \"paletteSwitcher\") {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 91,
            "text": "  const container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 92,
            "text": "  if (!container) return;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 93,
            "text": "  container.innerHTML = \"\u003cb\u003eColor Palette:\u003c/b\u003e \";\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 94,
            "text": "  Object.keys(TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES).forEach(name =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 95,
            "text": "    const btn = document.createElement(\"button\");\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 96,
            "text": "    btn.textContent = name.replace(/([A-Z])/g, \" $1\").replace(/^./, s =\u003e s.toUpperCase());\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 97,
            "text": "    btn.onclick = () =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 98,
            "text": "      currentPaletteName = name;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 99,
            "text": "      currentPalette = TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[name];\r"

          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 101,

          {
            "lineNumber": 103,
            "text": "    btn.style.padding = \"4px 10px\";\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 104,
            "text": "    btn.style.borderRadius = \"4px\";\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 105,
            "text": "    btn.style.border = name === currentPaletteName ? \"2px solid #222\" : \"1px solid #aaa\";\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 106,
            "text": "    btn.style.background = name === currentPaletteName ? \"#eee\" : \"#fff\";\r"

          {

          },

            "lineNumber": 110,

            "lineNumber": 112,

        "originalContents": "let currentPalette = TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[currentPaletteName];\r\n\r\nlet teamColorMap = {};\r\n\r\nfunction updateTeamColorMap(currentTeams) {\r\n  // Remove teams no longer present\r\n  Object.keys(teamColorMap).forEach(team =\u003e {\r\n    if (!currentTeams.includes(team)) {\r\n      delete teamColorMap[team];\r\n    }\r\n  });\r\n\r\n  // Assign colors to new teams\r\n  const usedColors = Object.values(teamColorMap);\r\n  let paletteIdx = 0;\r\n  currentTeams.forEach(team =\u003e {\r\n    if (!teamColorMap[team]) {\r\n      // Find the next unused color in the palette\r\n      while (paletteIdx \u003c currentPalette.length \u0026\u0026 usedColors.includes(currentPalette[paletteIdx])) {\r\n        paletteIdx++;\r\n      }\r\n      // If we run out of unique colors, start reusing\r\n      teamColorMap[team] = currentPalette[paletteIdx % currentPalette.length];\r\n      paletteIdx++;\r\n    }\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\nfunction getTeamColor(team) {\r\n  return teamColorMap[team] || \"#888\"; // fallback color\r\n}\r\n\r\n// --- Palette Switcher UI ---\r\nfunction renderPaletteSwitcher(containerId = \"paletteSwitcher\") {\r\n  const container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r\n  if (!container) return;\r\n  container.innerHTML = \"\u003cb\u003eColor Palette:\u003c/b\u003e \";\r\n  Object.keys(TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES).forEach(name =\u003e {\r\n    const btn = document.createElement(\"button\");\r\n    btn.textContent = name.replace(/([A-Z])/g, \" $1\").replace(/^./, s =\u003e s.toUpperCase());\r\n    btn.onclick = () =\u003e {\r\n      currentPaletteName = name;\r\n      currentPalette = TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[name];\r\n      if (typeof window.refreshAllCharts === \"function\") window.refreshAllCharts();\r\n    };\r\n    btn.style.margin = \"0 4px\";\r\n    btn.style.padding = \"4px 10px\";\r\n    btn.style.borderRadius = \"4px\";\r\n    btn.style.border = name === currentPaletteName ? \"2px solid #222\" : \"1px solid #aaa\";\r\n    btn.style.background = name === currentPaletteName ? \"#eee\" : \"#fff\";\r\n    btn.style.cursor = \"pointer\";\r\n    container.appendChild(btn);\r\n  });\r\n}\r\n\r\n// --- Global chart refresh stub (user should implement) ---\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "if (!window.refreshAllCharts) {\r\n  window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n    // User: call your chart rendering functions here to update colors\r\n    // Example: updateTableLeagueWeek(); updateTablePosition(data); etc.\r\n    // console.log('refreshAllCharts called');\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\n// --- Palette Dropdown Handler for Navbar ---\r\ndocument.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", function() {\r\n  renderPaletteSwitcher();\r\n  // Palette dropdown in navbar\r\n  document.querySelectorAll('.palette-option').forEach(function(el) {\r\n    el.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\r\n      e.preventDefault();\r\n      const palette = el.getAttribute('data-palette');\r\n      if (palette \u0026\u0026 TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[palette]) {\r\n        currentPaletteName = palette;\r\n        currentPalette = TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[palette];\r\n        // Update navbar text\r\n        const text = el.textContent.trim();\r\n        const paletteText = document.getElementById('currentPaletteText');\r\n        if (paletteText) paletteText.textContent = text;\r\n        if (typeof window.refreshAllCharts === \"function\") window.refreshAllCharts();\r\n      }\r\n    });\r\n  });\r\n});\r\n\r\n// --- NOTE: Add \u003cdiv id=\"paletteSwitcher\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e to your HTML where you want the palette switcher to appear. ---\r\n\r\n// --- Update all chart color assignments below ---\r\n\r\n// Example for createLineChart:\r\nfunction createLineChart(data, order, containerId, title, labels, invertYAxis = false, yAxisRange = null) {\r\n    const container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r\n    if (!container) {\r\n        console.error('createLineChart: Container not found:', containerId);\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Coerce invertYAxis to boolean and log\r\n    const originalInvertYAxis = invertYAxis;\r\n    invertYAxis = (invertYAxis === true || invertYAxis === 'true');\r\n    console.log('createLineChart invertYAxis argument:', originalInvertYAxis, '-\u003e coerced:', invertYAxis, 'type:', typeof invertYAxis);\r\n",

          {
            "lineNumber": 142,
            "text": "// --- NOTE: Add \u003cdiv id=\"paletteSwitcher\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e to your HTML where you want the palette switcher to appear. ---\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 156,

        "originalContents": "if (!window.refreshAllCharts) {\r\n  window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n    // User: call your chart rendering functions here to update colors\r\n    // Example: updateTableLeagueWeek(); updateTablePosition(data); etc.\r\n    // console.log('refreshAllCharts called');\r\n  };\r\n}\r\n\r\n// --- Palette Dropdown Handler for Navbar ---\r\ndocument.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", function() {\r\n  renderPaletteSwitcher();\r\n  // Palette dropdown in navbar\r\n  document.querySelectorAll('.palette-option').forEach(function(el) {\r\n    el.addEventListener('click', function(e) {\r\n      e.preventDefault();\r\n      const palette = el.getAttribute('data-palette');\r\n      if (palette \u0026\u0026 TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[palette]) {\r\n        currentPaletteName = palette;\r\n        currentPalette = TEAM_COLOR_PALETTES[palette];\r\n        // Update navbar text\r\n        const text = el.textContent.trim();\r\n        const paletteText = document.getElementById('currentPaletteText');\r\n        if (paletteText) paletteText.textContent = text;\r\n        if (typeof window.refreshAllCharts === \"function\") window.refreshAllCharts();\r\n      }\r\n    });\r\n  });\r\n});\r\n\r\n// --- NOTE: Add \u003cdiv id=\"paletteSwitcher\"\u003e\u003c/div\u003e to your HTML where you want the palette switcher to appear. ---\r\n\r\n// --- Update all chart color assignments below ---\r\n\r\n// Example for createLineChart:\r\nfunction createLineChart(data, order, containerId, title, labels, invertYAxis = false, yAxisRange = null) {\r\n    const container = document.getElementById(containerId);\r\n    if (!container) {\r\n        console.error('createLineChart: Container not found:', containerId);\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Coerce invertYAxis to boolean and log\r\n    const originalInvertYAxis = invertYAxis;\r\n    invertYAxis = (invertYAxis === true || invertYAxis === 'true');\r\n    console.log('createLineChart invertYAxis argument:', originalInvertYAxis, '-\u003e coerced:', invertYAxis, 'type:', typeof invertYAxis);\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\r\n\u003chtml lang=\"en\"\u003e\r\n\u003chead\u003e\r\n    \u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cmeta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\"\u003e\r\n    \u003ctitle\u003eBowl-A-Lyzer\u003c/title\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Bootstrap CSS --\u003e\r\n    \u003clink href=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.3/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Custom CSS --\u003e\r\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\r\n        :root {\r\n            /* Color Palette */\r\n            --color-green-light: #a1e8c4;   /* Lightest green */\r\n            --color-green: #86e1b3;         /* Light green */\r\n            --color-blue-lightest: #7dcfe6; /* Light blue-green */\r\n            --color-blue-light: #4aa8c2;    /* Light blue */\r\n            --color-blue: #0a9dc7;          /* Dark blue */\r\n\r\n\r\n            /* Semantic Color Assignments */\r\n            --theme-primary: var(--color-blue);         /* Main UI elements like navbar, card headers */\r\n            --theme-secondary: var(--color-blue-light); /* Buttons, interactive elements */\r\n            --theme-accent: var(--color-blue-lightest); /* Highlights, accents */\r\n            --theme-warning: var(--color-green);        /* Warning states */\r\n            --theme-info: var(--color-green-light);     /* Info states */\r\n            \r\n            /* Background Colors */\r\n            --theme-background: #f8f9fa;\r\n            --theme-surface: #ffffff;\r\n            \r\n            /* Text Colors */\r\n            --theme-text-on-primary: #ffffff;\r\n            --theme-text-on-secondary: #ffffff;\r\n            --theme-text-on-light: var(--color-blue);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        body {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-background);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .navbar {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-primary) !important;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .navbar-brand, .nav-link {\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-primary) !important;\r\n        }\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\u003chtml lang=\"en\"\u003e\r"

            "lineNumber": 3,

            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "    \u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "    \u003cmeta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    \u003ctitle\u003eBowl-A-Lyzer\u003c/title\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "    \u003c!-- Bootstrap CSS --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    \u003clink href=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.3/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "    \u003c!-- Custom CSS --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    \u003cstyle\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        :root {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "            /* Color Palette */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "            --color-green-light: #a1e8c4;   /* Lightest green */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "            --color-green: #86e1b3;         /* Light green */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "            --color-blue-lightest: #7dcfe6; /* Light blue-green */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "            --color-blue-light: #4aa8c2;    /* Light blue */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "            --color-blue: #0a9dc7;          /* Dark blue */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "            /* Semantic Color Assignments */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "            --theme-primary: var(--color-blue);         /* Main UI elements like navbar, card headers */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "            --theme-secondary: var(--color-blue-light); /* Buttons, interactive elements */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "            --theme-accent: var(--color-blue-lightest); /* Highlights, accents */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            --theme-warning: var(--color-green);        /* Warning states */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "            --theme-info: var(--color-green-light);     /* Info states */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "            /* Background Colors */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "            --theme-background: #f8f9fa;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            --theme-surface: #ffffff;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "            /* Text Colors */\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "            --theme-text-on-primary: #ffffff;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "            --theme-text-on-secondary: #ffffff;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "            --theme-text-on-light: var(--color-blue);\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        body {\r"

            "text": "            background-color: var(--theme-background);\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        }\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 48,

            "lineNumber": 50,

        "originalContents": "\u003c!DOCTYPE html\u003e\r\n\u003chtml lang=\"en\"\u003e\r\n\u003chead\u003e\r\n    \u003cmeta charset=\"UTF-8\"\u003e\r\n    \u003cmeta name=\"viewport\" content=\"width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0\"\u003e\r\n    \u003ctitle\u003eBowl-A-Lyzer\u003c/title\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Bootstrap CSS --\u003e\r\n    \u003clink href=\"https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bootstrap@5.3.3/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Custom CSS --\u003e\r\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\r\n        :root {\r\n            /* Color Palette */\r\n            --color-green-light: #a1e8c4;   /* Lightest green */\r\n            --color-green: #86e1b3;         /* Light green */\r\n            --color-blue-lightest: #7dcfe6; /* Light blue-green */\r\n            --color-blue-light: #4aa8c2;    /* Light blue */\r\n            --color-blue: #0a9dc7;          /* Dark blue */\r\n\r\n\r\n            /* Semantic Color Assignments */\r\n            --theme-primary: var(--color-blue);         /* Main UI elements like navbar, card headers */\r\n            --theme-secondary: var(--color-blue-light); /* Buttons, interactive elements */\r\n            --theme-accent: var(--color-blue-lightest); /* Highlights, accents */\r\n            --theme-warning: var(--color-green);        /* Warning states */\r\n            --theme-info: var(--color-green-light);     /* Info states */\r\n            \r\n            /* Background Colors */\r\n            --theme-background: #f8f9fa;\r\n            --theme-surface: #ffffff;\r\n            \r\n            /* Text Colors */\r\n            --theme-text-on-primary: #ffffff;\r\n            --theme-text-on-secondary: #ffffff;\r\n            --theme-text-on-light: var(--color-blue);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        body {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-background);\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-light);\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .navbar {\r\n            background-color: var(--theme-primary) !important;\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        .navbar-brand, .nav-link {\r\n            color: var(--theme-text-on-primary) !important;\r\n        }\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\u003clink href=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/css/tabulator.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n\u003cscript type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/js/tabulator.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nfunction createTable(config) {\r\n    const {\r\n        data,\r\n        columns,\r\n        headerGroups = [],  // This contains the actual colspan values\r\n        rowNumbering = true,\r\n        positionChange = false\r\n    } = config;\r\n\r\n    let currentData = [...data];\r\n\r\n    // Get colors for groups using #2196F3 as end color\r\n    const getGroupColors = () =\u003e {\r\n        const endColor = '#7ec2f8';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n        const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n        const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n        \r\n        return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n            if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n            if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n            \r\n            const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n            const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n            const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n            const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n            \r\n            return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n        });\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const hexToRgb = (hex) =\u003e {\r\n        hex = hex.replace(/^#/, '');\r\n        const bigint = parseInt(hex, 16);\r\n        const r = (bigint \u003e\u003e 16) \u0026 255;\r\n        const g = (bigint \u003e\u003e 8) \u0026 255;\r\n        const b = bigint \u0026 255;\r\n        return [r, g, b];\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const colors = getGroupColors();\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\u003clink href=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/css/tabulator.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\u003cscript type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/js/tabulator.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\u003cscript\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "function createTable(config) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "    const {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "        data,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "        columns,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "        headerGroups = [],  // This contains the actual colspan values\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        rowNumbering = true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "        positionChange = false\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    } = config;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "    let currentData = [...data];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    // Get colors for groups using #2196F3 as end color\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "    const getGroupColors = () =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "        const endColor = '#7ec2f8';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "        const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "        const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "        \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 22,
            "text": "        return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 23,
            "text": "            if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 24,
            "text": "            if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 25,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 26,
            "text": "            const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 27,
            "text": "            const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 28,
            "text": "            const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "            const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 30,
            "text": "            \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 31,
            "text": "            return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32,
            "text": "        });\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 33,
            "text": "    };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 34,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 35,
            "text": "    const hexToRgb = (hex) =\u003e {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 36,
            "text": "        hex = hex.replace(/^#/, '');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 37,
            "text": "        const bigint = parseInt(hex, 16);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38,
            "text": "        const r = (bigint \u003e\u003e 16) \u0026 255;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "        const g = (bigint \u003e\u003e 8) \u0026 255;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 40,
            "text": "        const b = bigint \u0026 255;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 41,
            "text": "        return [r, g, b];\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 42,
            "text": "    };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 43,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 44,
            "text": "    const colors = getGroupColors();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 45,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 46,
            "text": "    // Create mappings for column colors and last group columns\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 47
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\u003clink href=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/css/tabulator.min.css\" rel=\"stylesheet\"\u003e\r\n\u003cscript type=\"text/javascript\" src=\"https://unpkg.com/tabulator-tables@6.3.0/dist/js/tabulator.min.js\"\u003e\u003c/script\u003e\r\n\r\n\u003cscript\u003e\r\nfunction createTable(config) {\r\n    const {\r\n        data,\r\n        columns,\r\n        headerGroups = [],  // This contains the actual colspan values\r\n        rowNumbering = true,\r\n        positionChange = false\r\n    } = config;\r\n\r\n    let currentData = [...data];\r\n\r\n    // Get colors for groups using #2196F3 as end color\r\n    const getGroupColors = () =\u003e {\r\n        const endColor = '#7ec2f8';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n        const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n        const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n        \r\n        return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n            if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n            if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n            \r\n            const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n            const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n            const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n            const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n            \r\n            return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n        });\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const hexToRgb = (hex) =\u003e {\r\n        hex = hex.replace(/^#/, '');\r\n        const bigint = parseInt(hex, 16);\r\n        const r = (bigint \u003e\u003e 16) \u0026 255;\r\n        const g = (bigint \u003e\u003e 8) \u0026 255;\r\n        const b = bigint \u0026 255;\r\n        return [r, g, b];\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    const colors = getGroupColors();\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 46
          },
          "startPosition": {}
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/components/tables.html"
      },

        "contents": "\r\n    // Default colors from the palette\r\n    if (!colors) {\r\n        colors = {\r\n            positive: '#2CA02C',  // Green for wins\r\n            negative: '#D62728'   // Red for losses\r\n        };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Create single series with net values\r\n    const seriesData = data.map((value, index) =\u003e ({\r\n        value: value,\r\n        itemStyle: {\r\n            color: value \u003e= 0 ? colors.positive : colors.negative\r\n        }\r\n    }));\r\n\r\n    const series = [\r\n        {\r\n            name: 'Net Performance',\r\n            type: 'bar',\r\n            data: seriesData,\r\n            label: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                position: function(params) {\r\n                    return params.value \u003e= 0 ? 'right' : 'left';\r\n                },\r\n                formatter: function(params) {\r\n                    return Math.abs(params.value) \u003e 0 ? Math.abs(params.value) : '';\r\n                }\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n    ];\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    // Default colors from the palette\r\n    if (!colors) {\r\n        colors = {\r\n            positive: '#2CA02C',  // Green for wins\r\n            negative: '#D62728'   // Red for losses\r\n        };\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Create single series with net values\r\n    const seriesData = data.map((value, index) =\u003e ({\r\n        value: value,\r\n        itemStyle: {\r\n            color: value \u003e= 0 ? colors.positive : colors.negative\r\n        }\r\n    }));\r\n\r\n    const series = [\r\n        {\r\n            name: 'Net Performance',\r\n            type: 'bar',\r\n            data: seriesData,\r\n            label: {\r\n                show: true,\r\n                position: function(params) {\r\n                    return params.value \u003e= 0 ?     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function createScatterChart_vanilla(data, chartId, title, axis_labels) {\r\n    const canvas = document.getElementById(chartId);\r\n    if (!canvas) {\r\n        console.error('createScatterChart_vanilla: Canvas not found:', chartId);\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\r\n    // Destroy existing chart if it exists\r\n    if (window[chartId + 'Instance'] instanceof Chart) {\r\n        window[chartId + 'Instance'].destroy();\r\n    }\r\n    // Collect all points for regression\r\n    const allPoints = Object.values(data).flat();\r\n    const xs = allPoints.map(point =\u003e point[0]);\r\n    const ys = allPoints.map(point =\u003e point[1]);\r\n    // Calculate regression line\r\n    const n = xs.length;\r\n    const sumX = xs.reduce((a, b) =\u003e a + b, 0);\r\n    const sumY = ys.reduce((a, b) =\u003e a + b, 0);\r\n    const sumXY = xs.reduce((sum, x, i) =\u003e sum + x * ys[i], 0);\r\n    const sumXX = xs.reduce((sum, x) =\u003e sum + x * x, 0);\r\n    const slope = (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / (n * sumXX - sumX * sumX);\r\n    const intercept = (sumY - slope * sumX) / n;\r\n    // Create regression line points\r\n    const minX = Math.min(...xs);\r\n    const maxX = Math.max(...xs);\r\n    const regressionLine = {\r\n        label: 'Regression',\r\n        data: [\r\n            {x: minX, y: slope * minX + intercept},\r\n            {x: maxX, y: slope * maxX + intercept}\r\n        ],\r\n        type: 'line',\r\n        borderColor: '#000000',\r\n        borderWidth: 1,\r\n        borderDash: [5, 5],\r\n        pointRadius: 0,\r\n        fill: false\r\n    };\r\n    // Create datasets for each team using palette colors\r\n    const teams = Object.keys(data);\r\n    const datasets = teams.map((team, idx) =\u003e ({\r\n        label: team,\r\n        data: data[team].map(point =\u003e ({x: point[0], y: point[1]})),\r\n        borderColor: getTeamColor(team),\r\n        backgroundColor: getTeamColor(team),\r\n        pointRadius: 5\r\n    }));\r\n    // Add regression line to datasets\r\n    datasets.push(regressionLine);\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 369,
            "text": "    ctx.style.height = '400px'; // Doubled from typical 200px height\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 370,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 371,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 372,
            "text": "function createScatterChart_vanilla(data, chartId, title, axis_labels) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 373,
            "text": "    const canvas = document.getElementById(chartId);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 374,
            "text": "    if (!canvas) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 375,
            "text": "        console.error('createScatterChart_vanilla: Canvas not found:', chartId);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 376,
            "text": "        return;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 377,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 378,
            "text": "    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 379,
            "text": "    // Destroy existing chart if it exists\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 380,
            "text": "    if (window[chartId + 'Instance'] instanceof Chart) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "        window[chartId + 'Instance'].destroy();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "    // Collect all points for regression\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "    const allPoints = Object.values(data).flat();\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "    const xs = allPoints.map(point =\u003e point[0]);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "    const ys = allPoints.map(point =\u003e point[1]);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "    // Calculate regression line\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388,
            "text": "    const n = xs.length;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "    const sumX = xs.reduce((a, b) =\u003e a + b, 0);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "    const sumY = ys.reduce((a, b) =\u003e a + b, 0);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "    const sumXY = xs.reduce((sum, x, i) =\u003e sum + x * ys[i], 0);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "    const sumXX = xs.reduce((sum, x) =\u003e sum + x * x, 0);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "    const slope = (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / (n * sumXX - sumX * sumX);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "    const intercept = (sumY - slope * sumX) / n;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "    // Create regression line points\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "    const minX = Math.min(...xs);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "    const maxX = Math.max(...xs);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "    const regressionLine = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "        label: 'Regression',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "        data: [\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "            {x: minX, y: slope * minX + intercept},\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "            {x: maxX, y: slope * maxX + intercept}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "        ],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "        type: 'line',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "        borderColor: '#000000',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "        borderWidth: 1,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "        borderDash: [5, 5],\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "        pointRadius: 0,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "        fill: false\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "    };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "    // Create datasets for each team using palette colors\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "    const teams = Object.keys(data);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "    const datasets = teams.map((team, idx) =\u003e ({\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "        label: team,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "        data: data[team].map(point =\u003e ({x: point[0], y: point[1]})),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "        borderColor: getTeamColor(team),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "        backgroundColor: getTeamColor(team),\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "        pointRadius: 5\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "    }));\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "    // Add regression line to datasets\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "    datasets.push(regressionLine);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "    window[chartId + 'Instance'] = new Chart(ctx, {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "        type: 'scatter',\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 424
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "function createScatterChart_vanilla(data, chartId, title, axis_labels) {\r\n    const canvas = document.getElementById(chartId);\r\n    if (!canvas) {\r\n        console.error('createScatterChart_vanilla: Canvas not found:', chartId);\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');\r\n    // Destroy existing chart if it exists\r\n    if (window[chartId + 'Instance'] instanceof Chart) {\r\n        window[chartId + 'Instance'].destroy();\r\n    }\r\n    // Collect all points for regression\r\n    const allPoints = Object.values(data).flat();\r\n    const xs = allPoints.map(point =\u003e point[0]);\r\n    const ys = allPoints.map(point =\u003e point[1]);\r\n    // Calculate regression line\r\n    const n = xs.length;\r\n    const sumX = xs.reduce((a, b) =\u003e a + b, 0);\r\n    const sumY = ys.reduce((a, b) =\u003e a + b, 0);\r\n    const sumXY = xs.reduce((sum, x, i) =\u003e sum + x * ys[i], 0);\r\n    const sumXX = xs.reduce((sum, x) =\u003e sum + x * x, 0);\r\n    const slope = (n * sumXY - sumX * sumY) / (n * sumXX - sumX * sumX);\r\n    const intercept = (sumY - slope * sumX) / n;\r\n    // Create regression line points\r\n    const minX = Math.min(...xs);\r\n    const maxX = Math.max(...xs);\r\n    const regressionLine = {\r\n        label: 'Regression',\r\n        data: [\r\n            {x: minX, y: slope * minX + intercept},\r\n            {x: maxX, y: slope * maxX + intercept}\r\n        ],\r\n        type: 'line',\r\n        borderColor: '#000000',\r\n        borderWidth: 1,\r\n        borderDash: [5, 5],\r\n        pointRadius: 0,\r\n        fill: false\r\n    };\r\n    // Create datasets for each team using palette colors\r\n    const teams = Object.keys(data);\r\n    const datasets = teams.map((team, idx) =\u003e ({\r\n        label: team,\r\n        data: data[team].map(point =\u003e ({x: point[0], y: point[1]})),\r\n        borderColor: getTeamColor(team),\r\n        backgroundColor: getTeamColor(team),\r\n        pointRadius: 5\r\n    }));\r\n    // Add regression line to datasets\r\n    datasets.push(regressionLine);\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 423
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 368
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/components/charts.html"
      },
      "score": 0.19140625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const getGroupColors = (headerGroups) =\u003e {\r\n    const endColor = '#2196F3';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n    const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n    const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n    \r\n    return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n        if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n        if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n        \r\n        const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n        const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n        const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n        const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n    });\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction createTableTabulator(tableId, data) {\r\n    // Check if the data has columns and data\r\n    if (!data || !data.columns || !data.data) {\r\n        console.error('Invalid data format');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Transform the data from array format to object format\r\n    const transformedData = data.data.map(row =\u003e {\r\n        const obj = {};\r\n        let index = 0; // Initialize index to track the position in the row array\r\n\r\n        // Loop through each column group\r\n        data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n            if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                // Loop through each column in the group\r\n                colGroup.columns.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n                    obj[col.field] = row[index]; // Assign the value from the row to the object\r\n                    index++; // Increment index for the next field\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        return obj; // Return the transformed object\r\n    });\r\n",

        "originalContents": "const getGroupColors = (headerGroups) =\u003e {\r\n    const endColor = '#2196F3';  // Bootstrap primary blue\r\n    const startRGB = [255, 255, 255];  // white\r\n    const endRGB = hexToRgb(endColor);\r\n    \r\n    return headerGroups.map((_, index) =\u003e {\r\n        if (index === 0) return 'rgb(255, 255, 255)';  // First group is white\r\n        if (index === headerGroups.length - 1) return endColor;  // Last group is primary blue\r\n        \r\n        const factor = index / (headerGroups.length - 1);\r\n        const r = Math.round(startRGB[0] + (endRGB[0] - startRGB[0]) * factor);\r\n        const g = Math.round(startRGB[1] + (endRGB[1] - startRGB[1]) * factor);\r\n        const b = Math.round(startRGB[2] + (endRGB[2] - startRGB[2]) * factor);\r\n        \r\n        return &#96;rgb(${r}, ${g}, ${b})&#96;;\r\n    });\r\n};\r\n\r\nfunction createTableTabulator(tableId, data) {\r\n    // Check if the data has columns and data\r\n    if (!data || !data.columns || !data.data) {\r\n        console.error('Invalid data format');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Transform the data from array format to object format\r\n    const transformedData = data.data.map(row =\u003e {\r\n        const obj = {};\r\n        let index = 0; // Initialize index to track the position in the row array\r\n\r\n        // Loop through each column group\r\n        data.columns.forEach(colGroup =\u003e {\r\n            if (colGroup.columns) {\r\n                // Loop through each column in the group\r\n                colGroup.columns.forEach(col =\u003e {\r\n                    obj[col.field] = row[index]; // Assign the value from the row to the object\r\n                    index++; // Increment index for the next field\r\n                });\r\n            }\r\n        });\r\n        return obj; // Return the transformed object\r\n    });\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n    // Dispose of existing chart instance if it exists\r\n    const existingChart = echarts.getInstanceByDom(container);\r\n    if (existingChart) {\r\n        existingChart.dispose();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (order == null) {\r\n        order = Object.keys(data);\r\n    }\r\n    // Update teamColorMap for this set of teams\r\n    updateTeamColorMap(order);\r\n\r\n    // Calculate y-axis range if requested\r\n    let yMin, yMax;\r\n    if (yAxisRange === 'auto') {\r\n        const allValues = order.map(team =\u003e data[team]).flat();\r\n        yMin = Math.max(Math.min(...allValues) - 10, 0);\r\n        yMax = Math.max(...allValues) + 10;\r\n    } else if (yAxisRange === 'exact') {\r\n        const allValues = order.map(team =\u003e data[team]).flat();\r\n        yMin = Math.min(...allValues);\r\n        yMax = Math.max(...allValues);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Create series from the data using the specified order\r\n    const series = order.map(team =\u003e ({\r\n        name: team,\r\n        type: 'line',\r\n        data: data[team],\r\n        lineStyle: {\r\n            color: getTeamColor(team),\r\n            width: 2\r\n        },\r\n        itemStyle: {\r\n            color: getTeamColor(team)\r\n        },\r\n        smooth: false\r\n    }));\r\n",

        "originalContents": "\r\n    // Dispose of existing chart instance if it exists\r\n    const existingChart = echarts.getInstanceByDom(container);\r\n    if (existingChart) {\r\n        existingChart.dispose();\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    if (order == null) {\r\n        order = Object.keys(data);\r\n    }\r\n    // Update teamColorMap for this set of teams\r\n    updateTeamColorMap(order);\r\n\r\n    // Calculate y-axis range if requested\r\n    let yMin, yMax;\r\n    if (yAxisRange === 'auto') {\r\n        const allValues = order.map(team =\u003e data[team]).flat();\r\n        yMin = Math.max(Math.min(...allValues) - 10, 0);\r\n        yMax = Math.max(...allValues) + 10;\r\n    } else if (yAxisRange === 'exact') {\r\n        const allValues = order.map(team =\u003e data[team]).flat();\r\n        yMin = Math.min(...allValues);\r\n        yMax = Math.max(...allValues);\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Create series from the data using the specified order\r\n    const series = order.map(team =\u003e ({\r\n        name: team,\r\n        type: 'line',\r\n        data: data[team],\r\n        lineStyle: {\r\n            color: getTeamColor(team),\r\n            width: 2\r\n        },\r\n        itemStyle: {\r\n            color: getTeamColor(team)\r\n        },\r\n        smooth: false\r\n    }));\r\n",
