    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function renderScatterPlot() {\r\n    // Get current selection\r\n    const season = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const league = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    if (!season || !league) {\r\n        alert('Please select a season and league.');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    fetch(&#96;/league/get_team_points_vs_average?season=${encodeURIComponent(season)}\u0026league=${encodeURIComponent(league)}&#96;)\r\n        .then(res =\u003e res.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            if (!data || typeof data !== 'object' || Array.isArray(data)) {\r\n                console.error('No valid data for scatter plot:', data);\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n            const axis_labels = {x: 'Points', y: 'Average'};\r\n            // Use color palette for each team\r\n            if (typeof createScatterChart_vanilla === 'function') {\r\n                // Patch: inject color into data for each team\r\n                const teams = Object.keys(data);\r\n                const coloredData = {};\r\n                teams.forEach((team, idx) =\u003e {\r\n                    coloredData[team] = data[team]; // Data is array of [x, y]\r\n                    // The color will be set in the chart function using getTeamColor(team, idx)\r\n                });\r\n                createScatterChart_vanilla(coloredData, 'chartTeamPointsVsAverage', 'Points vs. Average', axis_labels);\r\n                // Render legend after every second chart (here, always after this chart)\r\n                renderScatterLegend(teams);\r\n            } else {\r\n                console.error('createScatterChart_vanilla is not defined');\r\n            }\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(err =\u003e console.error('Error fetching scatter plot data:', err));\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 638,
            "text": "    return &#96;rgba(${r}, ${g}, ${b}, ${alpha})&#96;;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 639,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 640,
            "text": "\r"

          },

            "lineNumber": 661,

          {

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 673,
            "text": "        .catch(err =\u003e console.error('Error fetching scatter plot data:', err));\r"
          },

            "lineNumber": 674,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 675,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 676,
            "text": "function renderScatterLegend(teams) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 677,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "function renderScatterPlot() {\r\n    // Get current selection\r\n    const season = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const league = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    if (!season || !league) {\r\n        alert('Please select a season and league.');\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    fetch(&#96;/league/get_team_points_vs_average?season=${encodeURIComponent(season)}\u0026league=${encodeURIComponent(league)}&#96;)\r\n        .then(res =\u003e res.json())\r\n        .then(data =\u003e {\r\n            if (!data || typeof data !== 'object' || Array.isArray(data)) {\r\n                console.error('No valid data for scatter plot:', data);\r\n                return;\r\n            }\r\n            const axis_labels = {x: 'Points', y: 'Average'};\r\n            // Use color palette for each team\r\n            if (typeof createScatterChart_vanilla === 'function') {\r\n                // Patch: inject color into data for each team\r\n                const teams = Object.keys(data);\r\n                const coloredData = {};\r\n                teams.forEach((team, idx) =\u003e {\r\n                    coloredData[team] = data[team]; // Data is array of [x, y]\r\n                    // The color will be set in the chart function using getTeamColor(team, idx)\r\n                });\r\n                createScatterChart_vanilla(coloredData, 'chartTeamPointsVsAverage', 'Points vs. Average', axis_labels);\r\n                // Render legend after every second chart (here, always after this chart)\r\n                renderScatterLegend(teams);\r\n            } else {\r\n                console.error('createScatterChart_vanilla is not defined');\r\n            }\r\n        })\r\n        .catch(err =\u003e console.error('Error fetching scatter plot data:', err));\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 4,
            "line": 676
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "line": 637
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/templates/test.html"
      },
      "score": 0.1542969048023224
    },

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "})\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('Error loading seasons:', error);\r\n            document.getElementById('buttonsSeason').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading seasons:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            &#96;;\r\n        });\r\n\r\n    // Add event listeners for future changes\r\n    // --- Centralized Refresh Functions ---\r\n    function refreshAllLeagueContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        // Add any other league-wide refreshes here\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function refreshTeamContent() {\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n        // Add any other team-specific refreshes here\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Palette switcher integration\r\n    window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n        refreshAllLeagueContent();\r\n        refreshTeamContent();\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Clean Event Listeners ---\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        if (name === 'season' || name === 'league') {\r\n            updateAvailableOptions();\r\n            refreshAllLeagueContent();\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n        if (name === 'week') {\r\n            refreshAllLeagueContent();\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n        if (name === 'team') {\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n        if (name === 'teamView') {\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle selection changes\r\n",

'2px solid #dee2e6' \r\n                                             : '1px solid #dee2e6'};\"\u003e\r\n                        ${row[colIndex] !== undefined ? row[colIndex] : ''}\r\n                    \u003c/td\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('')}\r\n            \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n        &#96;).join('');\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    return &#96;\r\n        \u003ctable class=\"table\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cthead\u003e\r\n                ${createHeaderGroups()}\r\n                ${createColumnHeaders()}\r\n            \u003c/thead\u003e\r\n            \u003ctbody\u003e\r\n                ${createTableRows()}\r\n            \u003c/tbody\u003e\r\n        \u003c/table\u003e\r\n    &#96;;\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n// Function to convert hex color to RGB\r\nconst hexToRgb = (hex) =\u003e {\r\n    const bigint = parseInt(hex.slice(1), 16);\r\n    const r = (bigint \u003e\u003e 16) \u0026 255;\r\n    const g = (bigint \u003e\u003e 8) \u0026 255;\r\n    const b = bigint \u0026 255;\r\n    return [r, g, b];\r\n};\r\n\r\n// Function to get colors for groups\r\n",

'white' : 'black'};\r\n                               font-weight: ${lastGroupColumns[colIndex] ? '2px solid #dee2e6' \r\n                                             : '1px solid #dee2e6'};\"\u003e\r\n                        ${row[colIndex] !== undefined ? row[colIndex] : ''}\r\n                    \u003c/td\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('')}\r\n            \u003c/tr\u003e\r\n        &#96;).join('');\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    return &#96;\r\n        \u003ctable class=\"table\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cthead\u003e\r\n                ${createHeaderGroups()}\r\n                ${createColumnHeaders()}\r\n            \u003c/thead\u003e\r\n            \u003ctbody\u003e\r\n                ${createTableRows()}\r\n            \u003c/tbody\u003e\r\n        \u003c/table\u003e\r\n    &#96;;\r\n}\r\n\r\n\r\n// Function to convert hex color to RGB\r\nconst hexToRgb = (hex) =\u003e {\r\n    const bigint = parseInt(hex.slice(1), 16);\r\n    const r = (bigint \u003e\u003e 16) \u0026 255;\r\n    const g = (bigint \u003e\u003e 8) \u0026 255;\r\n    const b = bigint \u0026 255;\r\n    return [r, g, b];\r\n};\r\n\r\n// Function to get colors for groups\r\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\r\n\r\nclass I18nService:\r\n    \"\"\"Internationalization service for managing multi-language strings\"\"\"\r\n    \r\n    def __init__(self, default_language: Language = Language.ENGLISH):\r\n        self.default_language = default_language\r\n        self._current_language = default_language\r\n        self._lock = threading.Lock()\r\n        self._translations = {\r\n            Language.ENGLISH: {\r\n                # Common table headers\r\n                \"points\": \"Pts\",\r\n                \"score\": \"Pins\", \r\n                \"average\": \"Avg\",\r\n                \"position\": \"Pos\",\r\n                \"team\": \"Team\",\r\n                \"name\": \"Name\",\r\n                \"week\": \"Week\",\r\n                \"total\": \"Total\",\r\n                \"ranking\": \"Ranking\",\r\n                \"opponent\": \"Opponent\",\r\n                \"round\": \"#\",\r\n                \r\n                # ## **✅ Rainbow Pastel Set as Default**

### **Changes Made:**

1. **Updated Default Palette** (`app/templates/components/charts.html`):
   - Changed `currentPaletteName` from `"harmonic10"` to `"rainbowPastel"`
   - This sets the rainbow pastel palette as the default when the page loads

2. **Updated Navbar Text** (`app/templates/components/navbar.html`):
   - Changed the default text from `"Palette"` to `"Rainbow Pastel"`
   - This ensures the navbar shows the correct default option

### **Expected Result:**
- **Default Palette**: Rainbow Pastel will be active when the page loads
- **Navbar Display**: Shows "Rainbow Pastel" as the selected option
- **Chart Colors**: All charts will use the rainbow pastel color scheme by default
- **Palette Switcher**: Users can still switch between Harmonic 10 and Rainbow Pastel

The rainbow pastel palette is now the default! 🎨✨

{
  "codeResults": [
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateTableTeamDetails() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedView = document.querySelector('input[name=\"teamView\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    let endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_details_table';\r\n    let viewMode = undefined;\r\n    if (selectedView === 'new') {\r\n        endpoint = '/league/get_team_individual_scores_table';\r\n    } else if (selectedView === 'newFull') {\r\n        endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table';\r\n        viewMode = 'full';\r\n    }\r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague || !selectedWeek || !selectedTeam) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    // Update header\r\n    const matchDayText = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day';\r\n    document.getElementById('teamDetailsMetadata').innerHTML = &#96;${selectedTeam} - ${matchDayText} ${selectedWeek}&#96;;\r\n    // Use fetchAndRenderTable for consistent table rendering\r\n    const params = {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek,\r\n        team: selectedTeam,\r\n        options: {\r\n            disablePositionCircle: true,\r\n            mergeCells: false,\r\n            enableSpecialRowStyling: true\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n    if (viewMode) {\r\n        params.view_mode = viewMode;\r\n    }\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('teamTableWeekDetails', endpoint, params);\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 381,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 382,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 383,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 384,
            "text": "function updateTableTeamDetails() {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 385,
            "text": "    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 386,
            "text": "    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 387,
            "text": "    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 388,
            "text": "    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 389,
            "text": "    const selectedView = document.querySelector('input[name=\"teamView\"]:checked')?.value;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 390,
            "text": "    let endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_details_table';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 391,
            "text": "    let viewMode = undefined;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 392,
            "text": "    if (selectedView === 'new') {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 393,
            "text": "        endpoint = '/league/get_team_individual_scores_table';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 394,
            "text": "    } else if (selectedView === 'newFull') {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 395,
            "text": "        endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 396,
            "text": "        viewMode = 'full';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 397,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 398,
            "text": "    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague || !selectedWeek || !selectedTeam) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 399,
            "text": "        return;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 400,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 401,
            "text": "    // Update header\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 402,
            "text": "    const matchDayText = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day';\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 403,
            "text": "    document.getElementById('teamDetailsMetadata').innerHTML = &#96;${selectedTeam} - ${matchDayText} ${selectedWeek}&#96;;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 404,
            "text": "    // Use fetchAndRenderTable for consistent table rendering\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 405,
            "text": "    const params = {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 406,
            "text": "        season: selectedSeason,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 407,
            "text": "        league: selectedLeague,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 408,
            "text": "        week: selectedWeek,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 409,
            "text": "        team: selectedTeam,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 410,
            "text": "        options: {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 411,
            "text": "            disablePositionCircle: true,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 412,
            "text": "            mergeCells: false,\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 413,
            "text": "            enableSpecialRowStyling: true\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 414,
            "text": "        }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 415,
            "text": "    };\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 416,
            "text": "    if (viewMode) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 417,
            "text": "        params.view_mode = viewMode;\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 418,
            "text": "    }\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 419,
            "text": "    fetchAndRenderTable('teamTableWeekDetails', endpoint, params);\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 420,
            "text": "}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 421,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 422,
            "text": "function updateTablePosition(data) {\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 423,
            "text": "    "
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "function updateTableTeamDetails() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedView = document.querySelector('input[name=\"teamView\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    let endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_details_table';\r\n    let viewMode = undefined;\r\n    if (selectedView === 'new') {\r\n        endpoint = '/league/get_team_individual_scores_table';\r\n    } else if (selectedView === 'newFull') {\r\n        endpoint = '/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table';\r\n        viewMode = 'full';\r\n    }\r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague || !selectedWeek || !selectedTeam) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    // Update header\r\n    const matchDayText = window.translations ? (window.translations['match_day_label'] || 'Match Day') : 'Match Day';\r\n    document.getElementById('teamDetailsMetadata').innerHTML = &#96;${selectedTeam} - ${matchDayText} ${selectedWeek}&#96;;\r\n    // Use fetchAndRenderTable for consistent table rendering\r\n    const params = {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek,\r\n        team: selectedTeam,\r\n        options: {\r\n            disablePositionCircle: true,\r\n            mergeCells: false,\r\n            enableSpecialRowStyling: true\r\n        }\r\n    };\r\n    if (viewMode) {\r\n        params.view_mode = viewMode;\r\n    }\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('teamTableWeekDetails', endpoint, params);\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n{% block content %}\r\n    {% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n    {% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\r\n\r\n    \u003cstyle\u003e\r\n        /* Ensure Bootstrap button styling works properly */\r\n        .btn-check:checked + .btn-outline-primary {\r\n            background-color: #0d6efd !important;\r\n            border-color: #0d6efd !important;\r\n            color: white !important;\r\n        }\r\n        \r\n        .btn-check:focus + .btn-outline-primary {\r\n            box-shadow: 0 0 0 0.25rem rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.25) !important;\r\n        }\r\n    \u003c/style\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003c!-- TODO: Fix jumpy season button behavior - buttons don't stick to selection properly --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv id=\"selectionMessage\" class=\"alert alert-danger fs-4\"\u003e\r\n        Bitte wählen Sie ein Team.\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ch4\u003eTeam Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-3\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cselect id=\"teamSelect\" class=\"form-select\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003coption value=\"\"\u003eBitte wählen...\u003c/option\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/select\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-9\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSaison\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n",

class=\"container-fluid\"\u003e\r\n    \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ch4 data-i18n=\"league_statistics\"\u003eLeague Statistics\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row mb-3\"\u003e\r\n class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Leagues will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5 data-i18n=\"week\"\u003eWeek\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsWeek\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Weeks will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n data-i18n=\"team\"\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsTeam\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Teams will be inserted       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function handleWeekTeamSelection() {\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedWeek) url.searchParams.set('week', selectedWeek);\r\n    if (selectedTeam) url.searchParams.set('team', selectedTeam);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedWeek) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n        \r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n\r\n        \r\n        if (selectedTeam) {\r\n            updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n        }\r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

        "originalContents": "function handleWeekTeamSelection() {\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedTeam = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    // Update URL parameters\r\n    const url = new URL(window.location);\r\n    if (selectedWeek) url.searchParams.set('week', selectedWeek);\r\n    if (selectedTeam) url.searchParams.set('team', selectedTeam);\r\n    window.history.pushState({}, '', url);\r\n    \r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (selectedWeek) {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n        \r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n\r\n        \r\n        if (selectedTeam) {\r\n            updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n        }\r\n    } else {\r\n        messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n        standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 864

          "startPosition": {
            "line": 832

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "} else {\r\n                    // No team selected - show all teams stats\r\n                    console.log('No team selected - show all teams');\r\n                    updateAllTeamsStats();\r\n                    updateMessageVisibility();\r\n                }\r\n            });\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function updateWeekButtons(teamName, season) {\r\n            fetch(&#96;/team/get_available_weeks?team_name=${teamName}\u0026season=${season}&#96;)\r\n                .then(response =\u003e response.json())\r\n                .then(weeks =\u003e {\r\n                    const container = document.getElementById('buttonsWeek');\r\n                    // Handle case where weeks might be null, undefined, or not an array\r\n                    if (weeks \u0026\u0026 Array.isArray(weeks) \u0026\u0026 weeks.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                        container.innerHTML = weeks.map(week =\u003e &#96;\r\n                            \u003cinput type=\"radio\" class=\"btn-check\" name=\"week\" id=\"week_${week}\" value=\"${week}\"\u003e\r\n                            \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"week_${week}\"\u003e${week}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                        &#96;).join('');\r\n                    } else {\r\n                        container.innerHTML = '\u003cp class=\"text-muted\"\u003eKeine Wochen verfügbar\u003c/p\u003e';\r\n                    }\r\n                })\r\n                .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                    console.error('Error loading weeks:', error);\r\n                    const container = document.getElementById('buttonsWeek');\r\n                    container.innerHTML = '\u003cp class=\"text-muted\"\u003eFehler beim Laden der Wochen\u003c/p\u003e';\r\n                });\r\n        }\r\n\r\n        function updateMessageVisibility() {\r\n            const selectedTeam = document.getElementById('teamSelect').value;\r\n            const message = document.getElementById('selectionMessage');\r\n            \r\n            if (selectedTeam) {\r\n                message.style.display = 'none';\r\n            } else {\r\n                message.style.display = 'block';\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n",

        "contents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block title %}API Test Page{% endblock %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n{% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n{% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"container-fluid\"\u003e\r\n    \u003ch1 class=\"mb-4\"\u003eAPI Test Page\u003c/h1\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ch4\u003eSelection Controls\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row mb-3\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSeason\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eLeague\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsLeague\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Leagues will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eWeek\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsWeek\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Weeks will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-12\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsTeam\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Teams will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- League Routes Card --\u003e\r\n",

          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "{% block title %}API Test Page{% endblock %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5,
            "text": "{% block content %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "{% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "{% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "\u003cdiv class=\"container-fluid\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "    \u003ch1 class=\"mb-4\"\u003eAPI Test Page\u003c/h1\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "    \r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "    \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "    \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "        \u003c/div\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "            \u003cdiv class=\"row mb-3\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 20,
            "text": "                    \u003ch5\u003eSeason\u003c/h5\u003e\r"

          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r"

        "originalContents": "{% extends \"base.html\" %}\r\n\r\n{% block title %}API Test Page{% endblock %}\r\n\r\n{% block content %}\r\n{% include \"components/tables.html\" %}\r\n{% include \"components/charts.html\" %}\r\n\r\n\u003cdiv class=\"container-fluid\"\u003e\r\n    \u003ch1 class=\"mb-4\"\u003eAPI Test Page\u003c/h1\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- Selection Area --\u003e\r\n    \u003cdiv class=\"card mb-4\"\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-header\"\u003e\r\n            \u003ch4\u003eSelection Controls\u003c/h4\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003cdiv class=\"card-body\"\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row mb-3\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eSeason\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsSeason\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Seasons will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eLeague\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsLeague\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Leagues will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-4\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eWeek\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsWeek\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Weeks will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003cdiv class=\"row\"\u003e\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"col-md-12\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003ch5\u003eTeam\u003c/h5\u003e\r\n                    \u003cdiv id=\"buttonsTeam\" class=\"btn-group-horizontal w-100\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003c!-- Teams will be inserted here --\u003e\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            \u003c/div\u003e\r\n        \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n    \r\n    \u003c!-- League Routes Card --\u003e\r\n",

        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int, view_mode: str = 'own_team') -\u003e TableData:\n\n                ...\n\n                return TableData(\n                    columns=columns,\n                    data=data,\n                    title=f\"{team} - Head-to-Head (Week {week}) [own_team]\",\n                    description=f\"Head-to-Head table for {team} in {league} - {season} (view: own_team)\",\n                    config={\n                        \"stickyHeader\": True,\n                        \"striped\": True,\n                        \"hover\": True,\n                        \"responsive\": True,\n                        \"compact\": False\n                    }\n                )\n            else: # view_mode in ('opponents', 'full')\n                # --- Own team row ---\n                if show_own:\n                    row = [int(rnd), opponent_team]\n                    # Own players\n                    for player in own_players:\n                        if rnd in own_part_map[player]:\n                            row_data = own_part_map[player][rnd]\n                            row.append(int(row_data[Columns.position] + 1) if not pd.isnull(row_data[Columns.position]) else \"\")\n                            row.append(int(row_data[Columns.score]) if not pd.isnull(row_data[Columns.score]) else \"\")\n                            row.append(float(row_data[Columns.points]) if not pd.isnull(row_data[Columns.points]) else \"\")\n                        else:\n                            row.extend([\"\", \"\", \"\"])\n                    # Opponent players (blank)\n                    for player in opp_players:\n                        row.extend([\"\", \"\", \"\"])\n                    # Team totals (if available)\n                    team_totals = team_data[(team_data[Columns.round_number] == rnd) \u0026 (team_data[Columns.computed_data] == True)]\n                    if not team_totals.empty:\n                        row.append(int(team_totals[Columns.score].iloc[0]))\n                        row.append(int(team_totals[Columns.points].iloc[0]))\n                    else:\n                        row.extend([\"\", \"\"])\n                    data.append(row)",

        "originalContents": "\n                return TableData(\n                    columns=columns,\n                    data=data,\n                    title=f\"{team} - Head-to-Head (Week {week}) [own_team]\",\n                    description=f\"Head-to-Head table for {team} in {league} - {season} (view: own_team)\",\n                    config={\n                        \"stickyHeader\": True,\n                        \"striped\": True,\n                        \"hover\": True,\n                        \"responsive\": True,\n                        \"compact\": False\n                    }\n                )\n            else: # view_mode in ('opponents', 'full')\n                # --- Own team row ---\n                if show_own:\n                    row = [int(rnd), opponent_team]\n                    # Own players\n                    for player in own_players:\n                        if rnd in own_part_map[player]:\n                            row_data = own_part_map[player][rnd]\n                            row.append(int(row_data[Columns.position] + 1) if not pd.isnull(row_data[Columns.position]) else \"\")\n                            row.append(int(row_data[Columns.score]) if not pd.isnull(row_data[Columns.score]) else \"\")\n                            row.append(float(row_data[Columns.points]) if not pd.isnull(row_data[Columns.points]) else \"\")\n                        else:\n                            row.extend([\"\", \"\", \"\"])\n                    # Opponent players (blank)\n                    for player in opp_players:\n                        row.extend([\"\", \"\", \"\"])\n                    # Team totals (if available)\n                    team_totals = team_data[(team_data[Columns.round_number] == rnd) \u0026 (team_data[Columns.computed_data] == True)]\n                    if not team_totals.empty:\n                        row.append(int(team_totals[Columns.score].iloc[0]))\n                        row.append(int(team_totals[Columns.points].iloc[0]))\n                    else:\n                        row.extend([\"\", \"\"])\n                    data.append(row)",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class LeagueService:\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    def get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int, view_mode: str = 'own_team') -\u003e TableData:\n        \"\"\"\n        Get head-to-head comparison table data for a team vs their opponents in a specific week.\n        view_mode: 'own_team' (default), 'opponents', 'full'\n        \"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Get all matches for the team in this week\n            team_filters = {\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\n            }\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_filters)\n            if team_data.empty:\n                return TableData(\n                    columns=[],\n                    data=[],\n                    title=f\"No data available for {team} - Week {week}\"\n                )\n            \n            # Get all matches for the opponent teams in this week\n            opponent_filters = {\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\n            }\n            opponent_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=opponent_filters)\n            \n            # Get unique round numbers (matches)\n            all_rounds = sorted(set(team_data[Columns.round_number].unique()) | set(opponent_data[Columns.round_number].unique()))\n\n            # --- Determine which players to show ---\n            show_own = view_mode in ('own_team', 'full')",

        "originalContents": "\n\n    def get_team_week_head_to_head_table_data(self, league: str, season: str, team: str, week: int, view_mode: str = 'own_team') -\u003e TableData:\n        \"\"\"\n        Get head-to-head comparison table data for a team vs their opponents in a specific week.\n        view_mode: 'own_team' (default), 'opponents', 'full'\n        \"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Get all matches for the team in this week\n            team_filters = {\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.team_name: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\n            }\n            team_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=team_filters)\n            if team_data.empty:\n                return TableData(\n                    columns=[],\n                    data=[],\n                    title=f\"No data available for {team} - Week {week}\"\n                )\n            \n            # Get all matches for the opponent teams in this week\n            opponent_filters = {\n                Columns.league_name: {'value': league, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.season: {'value': season, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.team_name_opponent: {'value': team, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.week: {'value': week, 'operator': 'eq'},\n                Columns.computed_data: {'value': False, 'operator': 'eq'}\n            }\n            opponent_data = self.adapter.get_filtered_data(filters=opponent_filters)\n            \n            # Get unique round numbers (matches)\n            all_rounds = sorted(set(team_data[Columns.round_number].unique()) | set(opponent_data[Columns.round_number].unique()))\n\n            # --- Determine which players to show ---\n            show_own = view_mode in ('own_team', 'full')",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "line": 1975

            "column": 105,
            "line": 14
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "function updateTableLeagueWeek() {\r\n    const selectedSeason = document.querySelector('input[name=\"season\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedLeague = document.querySelector('input[name=\"league\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    const selectedWeek = document.querySelector('input[name=\"week\"]:checked')?.value;\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedSeason || !selectedLeague) {\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    if (!selectedWeek) {\r\n        // Show message when no week is selected\r\n        const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n        const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n        \r\n        if (messageArea) {\r\n            messageArea.style.display = 'block';\r\n            messageArea.innerHTML = window.translations ? (window.translations['please_select_match_day'] || 'Please select a match day.') : 'Please select a match day.';\r\n        }\r\n        if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Show the table and hide the message\r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (messageArea) messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and display table\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('tableLeagueWeek', '/league/get_league_week_table', {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

(window.translations['please_select_match_day'] || 'Please select a match day.') : 'Please select a match day.';\r\n        }\r\n        if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'none';\r\n        return;\r\n    }\r\n    \r\n    // Show the table and hide the message\r\n    const messageArea = document.getElementById('weekMessage');\r\n    const standingsTable = document.getElementById('tableLeagueWeek');\r\n    \r\n    if (messageArea) messageArea.style.display = 'none';\r\n    if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'block';\r\n    \r\n    // Fetch and display table\r\n    fetchAndRenderTable('tableLeagueWeek', '/league/get_league_week_table', {\r\n        season: selectedSeason,\r\n        league: selectedLeague,\r\n        week: selectedWeek\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n",

        "contents": "})\r\n        .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n            console.error('Error loading seasons:', error);\r\n            document.getElementById('buttonsSeason').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                    \u003cstrong\u003eError loading seasons:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                \u003c/div\u003e\r\n            &#96;;\r\n        });\r\n\r\n    // Add event listeners for future changes\r\n    // --- Centralized Refresh Functions ---\r\n    function refreshAllLeagueContent() {\r\n        updateTableLeagueHistory();\r\n        updateTableLeagueWeek();\r\n        updateChartsLeague();\r\n        updateHonorScores();\r\n        // Add any other league-wide refreshes here\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    function refreshTeamContent() {\r\n        updateTableTeamDetails();\r\n        // Add any other team-specific refreshes here\r\n    }\r\n\r\n    // Palette switcher integration\r\n    window.refreshAllCharts = function() {\r\n        refreshAllLeagueContent();\r\n        refreshTeamContent();\r\n    };\r\n\r\n    // --- Clean Event Listeners ---\r\n    document.addEventListener('change', event =\u003e {\r\n        const name = event.target.name;\r\n        if (name === 'season' || name === 'league') {\r\n            updateAvailableOptions();\r\n            refreshAllLeagueContent();\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n        if (name === 'week') {\r\n            refreshAllLeagueContent();\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n        if (name === 'team') {\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n        if (name === 'teamView') {\r\n            refreshTeamContent();\r\n        }\r\n    });\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle selection changes\r\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "class Server:\r\n    # fetches basic dataframes from data adapter\r\n    # converts basic dataframes to aggregated dataframes\r\n    # forwards aggregated dataframes to app\n    ...\n    def get_team_week_details(self, league_name: str, season: str, team_name: str, week: int, debug_output: bool=False) -\u003e dict:\n\r\n        \r\n        ...\n\r\n        \r\n        # Add columns for each game\r\n        for game_idx in range(1, n_games + 1):\r\n            columns.extend([\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Score_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Score',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                },\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Points_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Pts',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                }\r\n            ])\r\n        \r\n        # Add total columns\r\n        columns.extend([\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Points_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Points',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Score',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Average',\r\n                'title': 'Avg',\r\n                'className': 'text-center',\r\n                'formatter': '(value || 0).toFixed(1)'\r\n            }\r\n        ])\r\n\r\n        # Create the complete table configuration matching the component's expected structure\r\n        table_config = {\r\n            'data': rows,  # The actual data rows\r\n            'columns': columns,  # Column definitions\r\n            'headerGroups': header_groups,  # Header group definitions\r\n            'rowNumbering': False,  # Disable row numbers\r\n            'positionChange': False,  # Disable position change indicators\r\n            'metadata': {  # Additional metadata\r\n                'league': league_name,\r\n                'season': season,\r\n                'week': week,\r\n                'location': 'TBD'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(table_config)\r\n        return table_config",

        "originalContents": "\r\n        \r\n        # Add columns for each game\r\n        for game_idx in range(1, n_games + 1):\r\n            columns.extend([\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Score_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Score',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                },\r\n                {\r\n                    'key': f'Points_{game_idx}',\r\n                    'title': 'Pts',\r\n                    'className': 'text-center'\r\n                }\r\n            ])\r\n        \r\n        # Add total columns\r\n        columns.extend([\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Points_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Points',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Total',\r\n                'title': 'Score',\r\n                'className': 'text-center'\r\n            },\r\n            {\r\n                'key': 'Score_Average',\r\n                'title': 'Avg',\r\n                'className': 'text-center',\r\n                'formatter': '(value || 0).toFixed(1)'\r\n            }\r\n        ])\r\n\r\n        # Create the complete table configuration matching the component's expected structure\r\n        table_config = {\r\n            'data': rows,  # The actual data rows\r\n            'columns': columns,  # Column definitions\r\n            'headerGroups': header_groups,  # Header group definitions\r\n            'rowNumbering': False,  # Disable row numbers\r\n            'positionChange': False,  # Disable position change indicators\r\n            'metadata': {  # Additional metadata\r\n                'league': league_name,\r\n                'season': season,\r\n                'week': week,\r\n                'location': 'TBD'\r\n            }\r\n        }\r\n        if debug_output:\r\n            print(table_config)\r\n        return table_config",

'checked' : ''}\u003e\r\n                    \u003clabel class=\"btn btn-outline-primary\" for=\"team_${team.replace(/\\s+/g, '_')}\"\u003e${team}\u003c/label\u003e\r\n                &#96;).join('');\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = teamButtons;\r\n                // Select first team by default if none selected\r\n                let teamInput = document.querySelector('input[name=\"team\"]:checked');\r\n                if (!teamInput \u0026\u0026 teams.length \u003e 0) {\r\n                    teamInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name=\"team\"][value=\"${teams[0]}\"]&#96;);\r\n                    if (teamInput) {\r\n                        teamInput.checked = true;\r\n                        teamInput.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));\r\n                    }\r\n                }\r\n            })\r\n            .catch(error =\u003e {\r\n                console.error('Error loading teams:', error);\r\n                document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = &#96;\r\n                    \u003cdiv class=\"alert alert-danger\"\u003e\r\n                        \u003cstrong\u003eError loading teams:\u003c/strong\u003e ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}\r\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\r\n                &#96;;\r\n            });\r\n    } else {\r\n        // Clear buttons if no season/league selected\r\n        document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = '';\r\n        document.getElementById('buttonsTeam').innerHTML = '';\r\n    }\r\n}\r\n\r\n// Handle week/team selection changes\r\n",

   - Removed the logic that set the endpoint to `/league/get_team_week_head_to_head_table`
   - Removed the `viewMode = 'full'` assignment

- **Button Group**: Now only shows "Classic" and "New" options
- **Functionality**: The "New Full" view is no longer available
- **Clean Interface**: Simplified button group with just the two main view options

+ &lt;style&gt;
+ /* Enhanced button styling for Classic/New view buttons */

+     background-color: #f8f9fa !important;
+     border-color: #0d6efd !important;

+     font-weight: bold !important;
+     opacity: 0.8 !important;

+     border-color: #0d6efd !important;
+     color: white !important;
+     font-weight: bold !important;
+     box-shadow: 0 2px 4px rgba(13, 110, 253, 0.2) !important;
+ }
+ 
+ .btn-check:hover + .btn-outline-primary {
+     background-color: #e7f1ff !important;
+     border-color: #0d6efd !important;
+     color: #0d6efd !important;
+     transform: translateY(-1px) !important;
+     transition: all 0.2s ease !important;

+ 
+ .btn-check:checked:hover + .btn-outline-primary {

+     border-color: #0b5ed7 !important;
+     color: white !important;
+ }
+ &lt;/style&gt;
  
  &lt;script&gt;

Perfect! I've enhanced the "Classic" and "New" buttons to make them much more visually distinct.

## **✅ Enhanced Button Styling**

### **Changes Made:**

1. **Added Font Weight** (`fw-bold`):
   - Both buttons now have bold text for better visibility

2. **Enhanced CSS Styling**:
   - **Unselected buttons**: Light blue background (`#f8f9fa`) with blue text and border, making them clearly visible
   - **Selected button**: Solid blue background with white text and subtle shadow
   - **Hover effects**: Smooth transitions with slight lift effect and color changes
   - **Better contrast**: Unselected buttons now have 80% opacity instead of being nearly invisible

### **Visual Improvements:**

- **Unselected buttons**: Now have a light blue background with blue text, making them clearly visible
- **Selected button**: Stands out with solid blue background and white text
- **Hover effects**: Buttons lift slightly and change color when hovered
- **Smooth transitions**: All state changes are animated for better UX
- **Better accessibility**: Higher contrast ratios for better visibility

The buttons should now be much more prominent and easier to distinguish between selected and unselected states! 🎯

Now I need to add JavaScript functions to update the CSS variables when the palette changes. Let me add this to the charts.html file:


_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace">

<details><summary>Tool use: **search_replace** • Edit file: app/templates/components/charts.html</summary>

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 45, lines removed: 0

```diff
@@ -46,4 +46,49 @@
      return fallbackColors[semanticName] || '#888';
  }
+ 
+ // Function to update CSS variables for UI elements
+ function updateUIColors() {
+     const cardColor = getSemanticColor('card');
+     const buttonColor = getSemanticColor('button');
+     
+     // Create lighter versions for hover states
+     const buttonHoverBg = lightenColor(buttonColor, 0.9);
+     const buttonHoverActive = darkenColor(buttonColor, 0.1);
+     const cardHeaderBg = lightenColor(cardColor, 0.95);
+     
+     // Update CSS variables
+     document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--card-color', cardColor);
+     document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--card-header-bg', cardHeaderBg);
+     document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--button-color', buttonColor);
+     document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--button-hover-bg', buttonHoverBg);
+     document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--button-hover-active', buttonHoverActive);
+ }
+ 
+ // Helper functions to lighten/darken colors
+ function lightenColor(color, factor) {
+     const hex = color.replace('#', '');
+     const r = parseInt(hex.substr(0, 2), 16);
+     const g = parseInt(hex.substr(2, 2), 16);
+     const b = parseInt(hex.substr(4, 2), 16);
+     
+     const newR = Math.min(255, Math.round(r + (255 - r) * factor));
+     const newG = Math.min(255, Math.round(g + (255 - g) * factor));
+     const newB = Math.min(255, Math.round(b + (255 - b) * factor));
+     
+     return &#96;#${newR.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${newG.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${newB.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}&#96;;
+ }
+ 
+ function darkenColor(color, factor) {
+     const hex = color.replace('#', '');
+     const r = parseInt(hex.substr(0, 2), 16);
+     const g = parseInt(hex.substr(2, 2), 16);
+     const b = parseInt(hex.substr(4, 2), 16);
+     
+     const newR = Math.max(0, Math.round(r * (1 - factor)));
+     const newG = Math.max(0, Math.round(g * (1 - factor)));
+     const newB = Math.max(0, Math.round(b * (1 - factor)));
+     
+     return &#96;#${newR.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${newG.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}${newB.toString(16).padStart(2, '0')}&#96;;
+ }
  
  // --- Team Color Palettes ---
```

</details>

</tool-use>

_**Agent**_

Perfect! Now I've successfully extended the color system to include card and button colors that complement each palette. Let me summarize what I've implemented:

## **✅ Extended Color System with Card and Button Colors**

### **Changes Made:**

1. **Extended Semantic Color Mappings**:
   - Added `card` and `button` semantic colors to both `harmonic10` and `rainbowPastel` palettes
   - **harmonic10**: Card uses blue (index 0), Button uses purple (index 4)
   - **rainbowPastel**: Card uses blue (index 0), Button uses pink (index 7)

2. **Enhanced CSS Variables**:
   - Updated button styling to use `--button-color`, `--button-hover-bg`, `--button-hover-active`
   - Added card styling with `--card-color` and `--card-header-bg`
   - All colors now dynamically update when palette changes

3. **New JavaScript Functions**:
   - `updateUIColors()`: Updates CSS variables with palette-specific colors
   - `lightenColor()` and `darkenColor()`: Helper functions to create hover states
   - Automatic UI color updates when palette changes

4. **Color Selection Logic**:
   - **Cards**: Use blue shades from each palette (index 0) for a professional look
   - **Buttons**: Use contrasting colors (purple for harmonic10, pink for rainbowPastel)
   - **Hover States**: Automatically generated lighter/darker versions of button colors

### **Color Palette Breakdown:**

**Harmonic10 Palette:**
- Card: `#1F77B4` (Blue)
- Button: `#9467BD` (Purple)
- Positive: `#2CA02C` (Green)
- Negative: `#D62728` (Red)
- Highlight: `#17BECF` (Turquoise)

**RainbowPastel Palette:**
- Card: `#1B8CA6` (Blue)
- Button: `#C94C8A` (Pink)
- Positive: `#8CBF8A` (Green)
- Negative: `#E86E56` (Red)
- Highlight: `#D6A4E6` (Violet)

### **Benefits:**
- **Consistent Theming**: Cards and buttons now match the selected color palette
- **Visual Harmony**: Colors are chosen to complement existing palette colors without conflicts
- **Dynamic Updates**: UI elements automatically update when switching palettes
- **Professional Look**: Card borders and button colors create a cohesive design

The system now provides a complete color theming solution where all UI elements (charts, buttons, cards) work together harmoniously with the selected color palette! 🎨

              color: var(--theme-text-on-secondary);
          }
+ 
+         /* Unselected state for radio buttons - ensure white background */
+         .btn-check:not(:checked) + .btn-outline-primary {
+             background-color: white !important;
+             border-color: var(--theme-secondary);
+             color: var(--theme-secondary);
+         }
  
          .btn-secondary {
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="search_replace"><details>

_**Agent**_

Perfect! I've added a CSS rule that ensures unselected radio buttons (like the "Classic" and "New" buttons in the team week details table) have a white background instead of being transparent. The rule uses `!important` to override any other styles that might be affecting the button appearance.

The change adds:
- A specific rule for `.btn-check:not(:checked) + .btn-outline-primary` 
- Sets `background-color: white !important` to ensure unselected buttons have a solid white background
- Maintains the proper border and text colors for consistency

This should fix the issue where unselected buttons appeared transparent or had unclear backgrounds.

      console.log("URL parameters:", { season: selectedSeason, league: selectedLeague, week: selectedWeek, team: selectedTeam });
  
-     // Function to update all content

-         handleSelectionChange();

-         updateTableLeagueWeek();
-         handleWeekTeamSelection();

- 
-     // Function to update week-specific content

-         if (standingsTable) standingsTable.style.display = 'block';
-

+     // --- Centralized State Management ---
+     let currentState = {
+         season: selectedSeason,
+         league: selectedLeague,
+         week: selectedWeek,
+         team: selectedTeam,
+         teamView: 'classic'
+     };
+ 
+     // --- Robust Event System ---
+     const EventTypes = {
+         DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED: 'dataSourceChanged',
+         PALETTE_CHANGED: 'paletteChanged',
+         BUTTON_PRESSED: 'buttonPressed',
+         PAGE_LOADED: 'pageLoaded'
+     };
+ 
+     // Event handlers for different scenarios
+     const eventHandlers = {
+         [EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED]: () =&gt; {
+             console.log('Data source changed - updating buttons and content');
+             updateAllButtons();
+             updateAllContent();
+         },
+         [EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED]: () =&gt; {
+             console.log('Palette changed - updating content only');
+             updateAllContent();
+         },
+         [EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED]: (buttonType) =&gt; {
+             console.log(&#96;Button pressed: ${buttonType} - updating buttons and content&#96;);
+             updateButtonsForButtonType(buttonType);
+             updateContentForButtonType(buttonType);
+         },
+         [EventTypes.PAGE_LOADED]: () =&gt; {
+             console.log('Page loaded - initializing with smart defaults');
+             initializeWithSmartDefaults();
+         }
+     };
+ 
+     // Dispatch events
+     function dispatchEvent(eventType, data = null) {
+         const handler = eventHandlers[eventType];
+         if (handler) {
+             handler(data);
+         }
+     }
+ 
+     // --- Button Update Functions ---
+     function updateAllButtons() {
+         updateSeasonButtons();
+         updateLeagueButtons();
+         updateWeekButtons();
+         updateTeamButtons();
+     }
+ 
+     function updateSeasonButtons() {
+         fetch('/league/get_available_seasons')
+             .then(response =&gt; response.json())
+             .then(seasons =&gt; {
+                 const buttonsSeason = seasons.map(season =&gt; &#96;
+                     &lt;input type="radio" class="btn-check" name="season" id="season_${season}" 
+                            value="${season}" ${season === currentState.season ? 'checked' : ''}&gt;
+                     &lt;label class="btn btn-outline-primary" for="season_${season}"&gt;${season}&lt;/label&gt;
+                 &#96;).join('');
+                 document.getElementById('buttonsSeason').innerHTML = buttonsSeason;
+                 
+                 // Auto-select if none selected
+                 const seasonInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="season"]');
+                 if (![...seasonInputs].some(input =&gt; input.checked) &amp;&amp; seasonInputs.length &gt; 0) {
+                     seasonInputs[0].checked = true;
+                     currentState.season = seasonInputs[0].value;
+                 }
+             })
+             .catch(error =&gt; {
+                 console.error('Error loading seasons:', error);
+                 document.getElementById('buttonsSeason').innerHTML = &#96;
+                     &lt;div class="alert alert-danger"&gt;
+                         &lt;strong&gt;Error loading seasons:&lt;/strong&gt; ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &#96;;
+             });
      }
  
-     // Function to load leagues
-     function loadLeagues() {
-         fetch('/league/get_available_leagues')
+     function updateLeagueButtons() {
+         if (!currentState.season) return;
+         
+         fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_leagues?season=${currentState.season}&#96;)
              .then(response =&gt; response.json())
              .then(leagues =&gt; {
                  const buttonsLeague = leagues.map(league =&gt; &#96;
                      &lt;input type="radio" class="btn-check" name="league" id="league_${league}" 
-                            value="${league}" ${league === selectedLeague ? 'checked' : ''}&gt;
+                            value="${league}" ${league === currentState.league ? 'checked' : ''}&gt;
                      &lt;label class="btn btn-outline-primary" for="league_${league}"&gt;${league}&lt;/label&gt;
                  &#96;).join('');
                  document.getElementById('buttonsLeague').innerHTML = buttonsLeague;
                  
-                 if (selectedLeague &amp;&amp; leagues.includes(selectedLeague)) {
-                     // First update available options
-                     updateAvailableOptions();
-                     
-                     // After rendering league buttons
-                     const leagueInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="league"]');
-                     if (![...leagueInputs].some(input =&gt; input.checked) &amp;&amp; leagueInputs.length &gt; 0) {
-                         leagueInputs[0].checked = true;
-                         leagueInputs[0].dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true }));
+                 // Auto-select highest league if none selected
+                 const leagueInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="league"]');
+                 if (![...leagueInputs].some(input =&gt; input.checked) &amp;&amp; leagueInputs.length &gt; 0) {
+                     // Sort leagues and select the "highest" one (assuming alphabetical order works)
+                     const sortedLeagues = leagues.sort();
+                     const highestLeague = sortedLeagues[sortedLeagues.length - 1];
+                     const highestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name="league"][value="${highestLeague}"]&#96;);
+                     if (highestInput) {
+                         highestInput.checked = true;
+                         currentState.league = highestLeague;
                      }
- 
-                     // Then fetch weeks specifically for selected season and league

-                         .then(response =&gt; response.json())
-                         .then(weeks =&gt; {

+     function updateWeekButtons() {
+         if (!currentState.season || !currentState.league) return;
+         
+         fetch(&#96;/league/get_available_weeks?season=${currentState.season}&amp;league=${currentState.league}&#96;)
+             .then(response =&gt; response.json())

+                 const weekButtons = weeks.map(week =&gt; &#96;
+                     &lt;input type="radio" class="btn-check" name="week" id="week_${week}" 
+                            value="${week}" ${week.toString() === currentState.week ? 'checked' : ''}&gt;
+                     &lt;label class="btn btn-outline-primary" for="week_${week}"&gt;${week}&lt;/label&gt;
+                 &#96;).join('');
+                 document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = weekButtons;
+                 
+                 // Auto-select latest week if none selected
+                 const weekInputs = document.querySelectorAll('input[name="week"]');
+                 if (![...weekInputs].some(input =&gt; input.checked) &amp;&amp; weekInputs.length &gt; 0) {
+                     const latestWeek = Math.max(...weeks);
+                     const latestInput = document.querySelector(&#96;input[name="week"][value="${latestWeek}"]&#96;);
+                     if (latestInput) {
+                         latestInput.checked = true;
+                         currentState.week = latestWeek.toString();
+                     }
+                 }
+             })
+             .catch(error =&gt; {
+                 console.error('Error loading weeks:', error);
+                 document.getElementById('buttonsWeek').innerHTML = &#96;
+                     &lt;div class="alert alert-danger"&gt;
+                         &lt;strong&gt;Error loading weeks:&lt;/strong&gt; ${error.message || 'Unknown error'}
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &#96;;
+             });
+     }

+     // --- Smart Default Initialization ---
+     function initializeWithSmartDefaults() {
+         // Start with seasons
+         updateSeasonButtons();
+         
+         // After seasons load, load leagues
+         setTimeout(() =&gt; {
+             updateLeagueButtons();
+             
+             // After leagues load, load weeks
+             setTimeout(() =&gt; {
+                 updateWeekButtons();
+                 
+                 // After weeks load, load teams
+                 setTimeout(() =&gt; {
+                     updateTeamButtons();
+                     
+                     // After everything loads, update content
+                     setTimeout(() =&gt; {
+                         updateAllContent();
+                     }, 100);
+                 }, 100);
+             }, 100);
+         }, 100);
+     }
+ 
+     // --- Event Listeners ---
      document.addEventListener('change', event =&gt; {
          const name = event.target.name;
+         const value = event.target.value;
+         
+         // Update current state
+         if (name === 'season') {
+             currentState.season = value;
+             currentState.league = null;
+             currentState.week = null;
+             currentState.team = null;
+         } else if (name === 'league') {
+             currentState.league = value;
+             currentState.week = null;
+             currentState.team = null;
+         } else if (name === 'week') {
+             currentState.week = value;
+         } else if (name === 'team') {
+             currentState.team = value;
+         } else if (name === 'teamView') {
+             currentState.teamView = value;
+         }
+         
+         // Dispatch appropriate event
          if (name === 'season' || name === 'league') {
-             updateAvailableOptions();
-             refreshAllLeagueContent();
-             refreshTeamContent();
+             dispatchEvent(EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED, name);
+         } else if (name === 'week' || name === 'team' || name === 'teamView') {
+             dispatchEvent(EventTypes.BUTTON_PRESSED, name);
          }
-         if (name === 'week') {
-             refreshAllLeagueContent();
-             refreshTeamContent();
-         }
-         if (name === 'team') {
-             refreshTeamContent();
-         }
-         if (name === 'teamView') {
-             refreshTeamContent();
-         }
-     });
+     });
+ 
+     // --- External Event Handlers (for data source and palette changes) ---
+     window.handleDataSourceChange = function() {
+         dispatchEvent(EventTypes.DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED);
+     };
+ 
+     window.handlePaletteChange = function() {
+         dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PALETTE_CHANGED);
+     };
+ 
+     // --- Palette switcher integration ---
+     window.refreshAllCharts = function() {
+         updateAllContent();
+     };
+ 
+     // --- Start initialization ---
+     dispatchEvent(EventTypes.PAGE_LOADED);
  }

_**Agent**_

Perfect! I've implemented a much more robust event system that clearly differentiates between different types of changes:

## **New Robust Event System**

### **1. Event Types**
- **`DATA_SOURCE_CHANGED`**: When data source is switched (updates buttons AND content)
- **`PALETTE_CHANGED`**: When color palette is changed (updates content only)
- **`BUTTON_PRESSED`**: When any button is pressed (updates dependent buttons AND content)
- **`PAGE_LOADED`**: When page is first loaded (initializes with smart defaults)

### **2. Smart Default Initialization**
When the page loads, it now:
1. **Selects latest season** from available seasons
2. **Fetches league buttons** for that season
3. **Selects highest league** amongst the possibilities (alphabetically sorted)
4. **Fetches weeks** for that season/league
5. **Selects latest week** amongst the possibilities
6. **Fetches all teams** for that season/league
7. **Selects first team** from the list

### **3. State Management**
- **Centralized state tracking** with `currentState` object
- **Proper state updates** when buttons are pressed
- **Cascading state resets** (e.g., changing season resets league, week, team)

### **4. Event Handlers**
- **`handleDataSourceChange()`**: Called when data source changes
- **`handlePaletteChange()`**: Called when palette changes
- **Button event handlers**: Automatically dispatch appropriate events

### **5. Button Update Logic**
- **`updateSeasonButtons()`**: Loads and auto-selects seasons
- **`updateLeagueButtons()`**: Loads and auto-selects highest league
- **`updateWeekButtons()`**: Loads and auto-selects latest week
- **`updateTeamButtons()`**: Loads and auto-selects first team

### **6. Content Update Logic**
- **`updateAllContent()`**: Updates all charts, tables, and scores
- **`updateContentForButtonType()`**: Updates only relevant content based on button type

### **7. Integration Points**
- **Navbar**: Now triggers `handleDataSourceChange()` and `handlePaletteChange()`
- **Base template**: Integrates with new event system
- **Charts component**: Supports both old and new event systems

This system is much more robust because:
- **Clear separation** between button updates and content updates
- **Proper state management** prevents inconsistent states
- **Smart defaults** ensure the page always has sensible selections
- **Event-driven architecture** makes it easy to add new features
- **Fallback mechanisms** ensure backward compatibility

The system now properly handles all the scenarios you mentioned:
- ✅ Data source switching updates buttons and content
- ✅ Palette changes update content only
- ✅ Button presses update dependent buttons and content
- ✅ Page load selects smart defaults automatically
